## Linkcard Plugin System & Demo Setup - Comprehensive Report

### 1. PluginRegistry Type Definition

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/types.ts`

```typescript
export type PluginRegistry = readonly LinkCardPlugin[]
```

The `PluginRegistry` is a read-only array of `LinkCardPlugin` objects, defined at line 109 of types.ts. Each element conforms to the `LinkCardPlugin` interface.

### 2. LinkCardPlugin Interface

**Location:** lines 67-104 in types.ts

```typescript
export interface LinkCardPlugin<TMeta = Record<string, unknown>> {
  /** 唯一标识符 */
  readonly name: string

  /** 可读名称（调试/文档用） */
  readonly displayName: string

  /** URL 匹配优先级（越高越先匹配） */
  readonly priority?: number

  /** 卡片样式类型 */
  readonly typeClass?: LinkCardTypeClass
  
  /** 插件依赖的 provider 名称，用于路由到对应请求适配器 */
  readonly provider?: string

  /**
   * 匹配 URL
   * @returns 匹配结果或 null
   */
  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null

  /**
   * 验证 ID 格式（支持显式 source 用法）
   */
  isValidId(id: string): boolean

  /**
   * 获取卡片数据
   * @param id - 解析后的标识符
   * @param meta - URL 匹配时的元数据
   * @param context - 运行时上下文（请求适配器、全局 fetcher 等）
   */
  fetch(
    id: string,
    meta?: TMeta,
    context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
  ): Promise<LinkCardData>
}
```

### 3. LinkCardTypeClass Union Type

**Location:** lines 56-62 in types.ts

```typescript
export type LinkCardTypeClass =
  | 'media'
  | 'github'
  | 'academic'
  | 'wide'
  | 'full'
```

Used to specify visual styling for different card categories.

### 4. Built-in Plugins Registry

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/plugins/index.ts`

The registry contains **12 built-in plugins**, sorted by priority (descending):

```typescript
export const plugins: PluginRegistry = [
  githubRepoPlugin,           // priority: 100
  githubCommitPlugin,         // priority: 95
  githubPrPlugin,             // priority: 95
  githubIssuePlugin,          // priority: 95
  githubDiscussionPlugin,     // priority: 95
  arxivPlugin,                // priority: 80
  tmdbPlugin,                 // priority: 70
  bangumiPlugin,              // priority: 70
  qqMusicPlugin,              // priority: 60
  neteaseMusicPlugin,         // priority: 60
  leetcodePlugin,             // priority: 65
  mxSpacePlugin,              // priority: 10
].sort((a, b) => (b.priority ?? 0) - (a.priority ?? 0))
```

Also provides:
- `getPluginByName(name: string)` - lookup function
- `pluginMap: Map<string, LinkCardPlugin>` - Map for O(1) lookups

### 6. GitHub Plugins Summary

| Plugin | Name | Priority | TypeClass | Provider | Hostname | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-----------|----------|----------|-------------|
| `githubRepoPlugin` | `gh-repo` | 100 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Repository info with star count |
| `githubCommitPlugin` | `gh-commit` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Commit with diff stats |
| `githubPrPlugin` | `gh-pr` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | PR with merge state & additions/deletions |
| `githubIssuePlugin` | `gh-issue` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Issue with state (open/closed) |
| `githubDiscussionPlugin` | `gh-discussion` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Discussion with category |

**Example: GitHub Repo Plugin (repo.tsx)**
- `matchUrl()`: Extracts owner/repo from URL path
- `isValidId()`: Validates format `owner/repo`
- `fetch()`: Calls GitHub API, renders title with star count, image with owner avatar
- Uses `camelcaseKeys()` for response transformation
- Uses `LanguageToColorMap` for language-based colors
- TypeClass: `'github'`, Provider: `'github'`

### 7. Media Plugins Summary

| Plugin | Name | Priority | TypeClass | Provider | Hostname | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-----------|----------|----------|-------------|
| `tmdbPlugin` | `tmdb` | 70 | `media` | `tmdb` | themoviedb.org | Movie/TV info with rating & poster |
| `bangumiPlugin` | `bangumi` | 70 | `media` | `bangumi` | bgm.tv / bangumi.tv | Anime/manga with ratings |
| `qqMusicPlugin` | `qq-music-song` | 60 | `wide` | `qq-music` | y.qq.com | QQ Music song with album art |
| `neteaseMusicPlugin` | `netease-music-song` | 60 | `wide` | `netease-music` | music.163.com | Netease song with album art |

**Key features:**
- TMDB & Bangumi use `classNames` to customize rendering:
  - `image: 'link-card__image--poster'` (portrait orientation)
  - `cardRoot: 'link-card--reversed'` (image on right)
- Music plugins return rich JSX with artist/album metadata

### 8. Academic & Code Plugins

| Plugin | Name | Priority | TypeClass | Provider | Hostname | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-----------|----------|----------|-------------|
| `arxivPlugin` | `arxiv` | 80 | `academic` | (none) | arxiv.org | Academic papers with authors |
| `leetcodePlugin` | `leetcode` | 65 | `wide` | `leetcode` | leetcode.cn / leetcode.com | LeetCode problem with difficulty |

**arxiv (arxiv.tsx):**
- No `provider` field (fetches directly)
- Uses DOMParser to parse XML response
- Returns title with paper ID, desc with author names

**leetcode (leetcode.tsx):**
- GraphQL POST request to `leetcode.cn/graphql/`
- Renders difficulty color-coded (Easy: green, Medium: orange, Hard: red)
- Returns JSX title with like count, desc with difficulty & tags

### 9. Self-hosted Plugin (MxSpace)

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/plugins/self/mx-space.tsx`

Two versions provided:

1. **`mxSpacePlugin` (default)** - priority: 10
   - `matchUrl()` returns `null` (no auto-matching)
   - Validates `posts/{category}/{slug}` or `notes/{nid}` format
   - Used when explicitly specified via `source` prop

2. **`createMxSpacePlugin(config: MxSpacePluginConfig)`** - factory function
   - Takes `webUrl` config to set hostname matching
   - Auto-matches URLs from your MxSpace instance
   - Returns custom plugin instance

**Interface:**
```typescript
export interface MxSpacePluginConfig {
  webUrl: string
}
```

export interface LinkCardFetchContext {
  /**
   * 全局默认 fetcher（当 provider 适配器不存在时使用）
   */
  fetchJson?<T = unknown>(input: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T>

   * 按 provider 注入请求适配器

   */
  adapters?: Record<string, LinkCardApiAdapter>
}
```

### 12. LinkCardRenderer Component Usage

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`

**Key implementation details (lines 49-220):**

```typescript
export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (props) => {
  const {
    url,
    title,
    description,
    favicon,
    image,
    source: explicitSource,
    id: explicitId,
    className,
    plugins = builtinPlugins,        // Default to built-in plugins
    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
  } = props

  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue

  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    () => new Map(plugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    [plugins],
  )

  // Match URL if no explicit source/id provided
  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    plugins,
  )
  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id

  // Fetch card data when dynamic fetch is enabled
  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    source,
    plugin: selectedPlugin,
    id: id || '',
    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
    context: fetchContext,
  })
  // ... renders skeleton during loading, error state, or final card
}
```

### 13. API Context Provider

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/FetchContext.tsx`

```typescript
const ctx = createContext<LinkCardFetchContext | undefined>(undefined)

export const LinkCardFetchProvider = ctx.Provider

export function useLinkCardFetchContext(): LinkCardFetchContext | undefined {
  return use(ctx)
}
```

Used to inject adapters and fetchers globally:
```tsx
<LinkCardFetchProvider value={{ adapters: { github: githubAdapter, ... } }}>
  <LinkCardRenderer url="..." />
</LinkCardFetchProvider>
```

export interface UrlMatchInfo {
  plugin: LinkCardPlugin
  match: UrlMatchResult
}

export function matchUrl(
  url: string,
  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
): UrlMatchInfo | null

export function useUrlMatcher(
  url: string | undefined,
  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
): UrlMatchInfo | null
```

Iterates through plugins in order and returns first match.

### 15. Utility Functions

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/utils.ts`

**Key utilities:**

1. **`camelcaseKeys<T>(obj: any): T`** - Converts snake_case keys to camelCase
2. **`fetchJsonWithContext<T>(url, context?, provider?, init?): Promise<T>`** - Routing logic:
   - Uses provider-specific adapter if available
   - Falls back to context.fetchJson if provided
   - Finally uses native fetch()
3. **`fetchGitHubApi<T>(url, context): Promise<T>`** - GitHub API helper
4. **`generateColor(str, saturation?, lightness?): string`** - Deterministic color from string hash
5. **`stripMarkdown(text): string`** - Removes markdown syntax
6. **`LanguageToColorMap`** - Language → hex color mapping (25+ languages)
7. **`bangumiTypeMap`** - Bangumi type mapping (subject/character/person)

### 16. Demo Setup

**No dedicated linkcard demo exists.** Instead:

1. **General Editor Demo:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/`
   - Uses `@haklex/rich-renderers` which includes linkcard
   - File: `src/fixtures/enhanced-renderers.ts` imports `enhancedRendererConfig`

2. **Integration:** Linkcard is bundled in:
   - `@haklex/rich-renderers` (static/read-only export)
   - `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` (full integration bundle)
   - `@haklex/rich-editor` (as default renderer)

3. **Production usage:** In `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/`
   - Uses `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` integration bundle
   - Provides `LinkCardFetchProvider` with custom adapters

### 17. Plugins Prop Usage Across Codebase

**Typical usage pattern:**

```tsx
// Custom plugins with fetch context
<LinkCardRenderer
  url="https://github.com/user/repo"
  plugins={customPlugins}                    // Optional: override default
  fetchContext={{
    adapters: {
      github: { request: githubFetch },
      tmdb: { request: tmdbFetch },
    }
  }}
/>

// Or with provider for global context
<LinkCardFetchProvider value={fetchContext}>
  <LinkCardRenderer url="..." />
</LinkCardFetchProvider>

// Explicit source + ID (skips URL matching)
<LinkCardRenderer
  source="gh-repo"
  id="innei/shiroi"
  url="https://github.com/innei/shiroi"
/>
```

### 18. LinkCardData Type

**File:** types.ts, lines 6-20

```typescript
export interface LinkCardData {
  /** 卡片标题 */
  title: ReactNode
  
  /** 卡片描述 */
  desc?: ReactNode
  
  /** 图片 URL */
  image?: string
  
  /** 高亮/主题色 (hex 格式) */
  color?: string
  
  /** CSS 类名覆盖 */
  classNames?: {
    image?: string
    cardRoot?: string
  }
}
```

Returned by every plugin's `fetch()` method. Supports both strings and JSX elements for rich formatting.

### 19. UrlMatchResult Type

**File:** types.ts, lines 25-32

```typescript
export interface UrlMatchResult {
  /** 解析后的 ID */
  id: string
  
  /** 完整 URL（用于链接跳转） */
  fullUrl?: string
  
  /** 额外元数据 */
  meta?: Record<string, unknown>
}
```

Returned by plugin's `matchUrl()` method.

### Summary

The linkcard plugin system is a flexible, extensible architecture where:

- **12 built-in plugins** handle GitHub (5), media (4), academic (1), code (1), and self-hosted (1) URLs
- **Plugins are prioritized** (100-10) for URL matching; highest priority matches first
- **TypeClasses** (`github`, `media`, `academic`, `wide`, `full`) control visual styling
- **Providers** route API requests to custom adapters via `LinkCardFetchContext`
- **`EnhancedLinkCardProps`** extends base renderer with `plugins`, `source`, `id`, and `fetchContext` props
- **No dedicated demo**; linkcard is tested via the general editor demo and production web app
- **Extensible via `createMxSpacePlugin()`** for custom self-hosted instances

    36→ */
    37→export interface LinkCardApiAdapter {
    38→  request<T = unknown>(input: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T>
    39→}
    40→
    41→/**
    42→ * LinkCard fetch 运行时上下文
    43→ */
    44→export interface LinkCardFetchContext {
    45→  /**
    46→   * 全局默认 fetcher（当 provider 适配器不存在时使用）
    47→   */
    48→  fetchJson?<T = unknown>(input: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T>
    49→  /**
    50→   * 按 provider 注入请求适配器

    52→   */
    53→  adapters?: Record<string, LinkCardApiAdapter>

    55→

    57→export type LinkCardTypeClass =

    61→  | 'wide'
    62→  | 'full'
    63→
    64→/**

    67→export interface LinkCardPlugin<TMeta = Record<string, unknown>> {

    69→  readonly name: string
    70→
    71→  /** 可读名称（调试/文档用） */

```text
     1→import type { LinkCardRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { Globe } from 'lucide-react'
     3→import type { ComponentType } from 'react'
     4→import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useLinkCardFetchContext } from './FetchContext'
     7→import { useCardFetcher } from './hooks/useCardFetcher'
     8→import { useUrlMatcher } from './hooks/useUrlMatcher'
     9→import { LinkCardSkeleton } from './LinkCardSkeleton'
    10→import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from './plugins'
    11→import * as styles from './styles.css'
    12→import type { LinkCardFetchContext, PluginRegistry } from './types'
    13→
    14→export interface EnhancedLinkCardProps extends LinkCardRendererProps {
    15→  source?: string
    16→  id?: string
    17→  className?: string
    18→  plugins?: PluginRegistry
    19→  fetchContext?: LinkCardFetchContext
    20→}
    21→
    22→function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
    23→  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)
    24→
    25→  return (
    26→    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
    27→      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (
    28→        <img src={favicon} alt="" onError={() => setFaviconFailed(true)} />
    29→      ) : (
    30→        <Globe aria-hidden="true" />
    31→      )}
    32→    </span>
    33→  )
    34→}
    35→
    36→function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
    37→  if (!classNames) return ''
    38→  return classNames
    39→    .split(/\s+/)
    40→    .filter(Boolean)
    41→    .map((cls) =>
    42→      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
    43→        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
    44→        : cls,
    45→    )
    46→    .join(' ')
    47→}
    48→
    49→export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (
    50→  props,
    51→) => {
    52→  const {
    53→    url,
    54→    title,
    55→    description,
    56→    favicon,
    57→    image,
    58→    source: explicitSource,
    59→    id: explicitId,
    60→    className,
    61→    plugins = builtinPlugins,
    62→    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
    63→  } = props
    64→
    65→  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
    66→  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue
    67→
    68→  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    69→    () => new Map(plugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    70→    [plugins],
    71→  )
    72→
    73→  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    74→    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    75→    plugins,
    76→  )
    77→  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
    78→  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id
    79→  const matchedFullUrl = urlMatch?.match.fullUrl
    80→
    81→  const useDynamicFetch = !!source && !!id
    82→  const selectedPlugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
    83→  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    84→    source,
    85→    plugin: selectedPlugin,
    86→    id: id || '',
    87→    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
    88→    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
    89→    context: fetchContext,
    90→  })
    91→
    92→  const typeClass = selectedPlugin?.typeClass
    93→  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
    94→  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
    95→    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
    96→    : ''
    97→
    98→  const finalTitle = cardInfo?.title || title || url
    99→  const finalDesc = cardInfo?.desc || description
   100→  const finalImage = cardInfo?.image || image
   101→  const finalColor = cardInfo?.color
   102→  const classNames = cardInfo?.classNames || {}
   103→  const mappedCardRootClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.cardRoot)
   104→  const mappedImageClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.image)
   105→
   106→  const [shortDesc, setShortDesc] = useState(false)
   107→  const descRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)
   108→
   109→  useEffect(() => {
   110→    const el = descRef.current
   111→    if (!el || !finalDesc) {
   112→      setShortDesc(false)
   113→      return
   114→    }
   115→    const style = getComputedStyle(el)
   116→    const lineHeight = Number.parseFloat(style.lineHeight) || 1.5 * 14
   117→    const maxTwoLines = lineHeight * 2
   118→    setShortDesc(el.scrollHeight <= maxTwoLines + 1)
   119→  }, [finalDesc, finalTitle])
   120→
   121→  if (useDynamicFetch && !isValid) {
   122→    return null
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  if (useDynamicFetch && loading) {
   126→    return (
   127→      <a
   128→        data-hide-print
   129→        ref={ref}
   130→        href={fullUrl}
   131→        target="_blank"
   132→        rel="noopener noreferrer"
   133→      >
   134→        <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
   135→      </a>
   136→    )
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  const hasImage = !!finalImage
   140→  const showImagePlaceholder = useDynamicFetch && isError && !hasImage
   141→
   142→  return (
   143→    <a
   144→      data-hide-print
   145→      ref={useDynamicFetch ? ref : undefined}
   146→      className={[
   147→        styles.card,
   148→        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
   149→        typeStyleClass,
   150→        typeSemanticClass,
   151→        shortDesc && styles.cardShortDesc,
   152→        shortDesc && styles.semanticClassNames.cardShortDesc,
   153→        useDynamicFetch && (loading || isError) && styles.cardSkeleton,
   154→        useDynamicFetch &&
   155→          (loading || isError) &&
   156→          styles.semanticClassNames.cardSkeleton,
   157→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.cardError,
   158→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.semanticClassNames.cardError,
   159→        'not-prose',
   160→        className,
   161→        mappedCardRootClass,
   162→      ]
   163→        .filter(Boolean)
   164→        .join(' ')}
   165→      data-source={source || undefined}
   166→      href={useDynamicFetch ? fullUrl : url}
   167→      target="_blank"
   168→      rel="noopener noreferrer"
   169→      style={{
   170→        borderColor: finalColor ? `${finalColor}30` : undefined,
   171→      }}
   172→    >
   173→      {finalColor && (
   174→        <div
   175→          className={`${styles.bg} ${styles.semanticClassNames.bg}`}
   176→          style={{
   177→            backgroundColor: finalColor,
   178→            opacity: 0.04,
   179→          }}
   180→        />
   181→      )}
   182→      {hasImage || showImagePlaceholder ? (
   183→        <span
   184→          className={[
   185→            styles.image,
   186→            styles.semanticClassNames.image,
   187→            mappedImageClass,
   188→          ]
   189→            .filter(Boolean)
   190→            .join(' ')}
   191→          data-image={finalImage || ''}
   192→          style={{
   193→            backgroundImage: finalImage ? `url(${finalImage})` : undefined,
   194→          }}
   195→        />
   196→      ) : (
   197→        <FallbackIcon favicon={favicon} />
   198→      )}
   199→      <span
   200→        className={`${styles.content} ${styles.semanticClassNames.content}`}
   201→      >
   202→        <span className={`${styles.title} ${styles.semanticClassNames.title}`}>
   203→          <span
   204→            className={`${styles.titleText} ${styles.semanticClassNames.titleText}`}
   205→          >
   206→            {finalTitle}
   207→          </span>
   208→        </span>
   209→        {finalDesc && (
   210→          <span
   211→            ref={descRef}
   212→            className={`${styles.desc} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc}`}
   213→          >
   214→            {finalDesc}
   215→          </span>
   216→        )}
   217→      </span>
   218→    </a>
   219→  )
   220→}
   221→
```
</details></tool-use>

    10→
    11→export const githubRepoPlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    12→  name: 'gh-repo',
    13→  displayName: 'GitHub Repository',
    14→  priority: 100,
    15→  typeClass: 'github',
    16→  provider: 'github',
    17→
    18→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    19→    if (url.hostname !== 'github.com') return null
    20→    const parts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
    21→    if (parts.length !== 2) return null
    22→    const [owner, repo] = parts
    23→    if (!owner || !repo) return null
    24→    return { id: `${owner}/${repo}`, fullUrl: url.toString() }
    25→  },
    26→
    27→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    28→    const parts = id.split('/')
    29→    return parts.length === 2 && parts[0].length > 0 && parts[1].length > 0
    30→  },
    31→
    32→  async fetch(id: string, _meta, context): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    33→    const [owner, repo] = id.split('/')
    34→    const response = await fetchGitHubApi(
    35→      `https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}`,
    36→      context,
    37→    )
    38→    const data = camelcaseKeys(response)
    39→
    40→    return {
    41→      title: (
    42→        <span style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px' }}>
    43→          <span style={{ flex: 1 }}>{data.name}</span>
    44→          <span style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>
    45→            {data.stargazersCount > 0 && (
    46→              <span
    47→                style={{
    48→                  display: 'inline-flex',
    49→                  alignItems: 'center',

    51→                  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd,
    52→                  color: '#fb923c',
    53→                }}
    54→              >
    55→                <Star size={14} strokeWidth={2} aria-hidden />
    56→                <span style={{ fontFamily: 'sans-serif', fontWeight: 500 }}>
    57→                  {formatStargazers(data.stargazersCount)}
    58→                </span>
    59→              </span>
    60→            )}
    61→          </span>
    62→        </span>
    63→      ),
    64→      desc: data.description,

    66→      color: (LanguageToColorMap as any)[data.language?.toLowerCase()],

     8→
     9→export interface MxSpacePluginConfig {

    11→}
    12→
    13→export function createMxSpacePlugin(
    14→  config: MxSpacePluginConfig,
    15→): LinkCardPlugin {
    16→  const webHost = new URL(config.webUrl).hostname
    17→
    18→  return {
    19→    name: 'self',
    20→    displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    21→    priority: 10,
    22→    provider: 'mx-space',
    23→
    24→    matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    25→      if (webHost !== url.hostname) return null
    26→      if (
    27→        !url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/') &&
    28→        !url.pathname.startsWith('/notes/')
    29→      ) {
    30→        return null
    31→      }
    32→      return { id: url.pathname.slice(1), fullUrl: url.toString() }
    33→    },
    34→
    35→    isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    36→      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    37→      if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') return false
    38→      if (type === 'posts') return rest.length === 2
    39→      return rest.length === 1
    40→    },
    41→
    42→    async fetch(
    43→      id: string,
    44→      _meta?: Record<string, unknown>,
    45→      context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    46→    ): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    47→      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    48→      let data: {
    49→        title: string
    50→        text: string
    51→        images?: { src: string }[]
    52→        meta?: Record<string, any>
    53→        cover?: string
    54→        summary?: string | null
    55→      } = { title: '', text: '' }
    56→
    57→      if (type === 'posts') {
    58→        const [cate, slug] = rest
    59→        data = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    60→          `posts/${cate}/${slug}`,
    61→          context,
    62→          'mx-space',
    63→        )
    64→      } else if (type === 'notes') {
    65→        const [nid] = rest
    66→        const response = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    67→          `notes/${nid}`,
    68→          context,
    69→          'mx-space',
    70→        )
    71→        data = response.data || response
    72→      }
    73→
    74→      const coverImage = data.cover || data.meta?.cover
    75→      const spotlightColor = generateColor(data.title)
    76→
    77→      return {
    78→        title: data.title,

    81→        color: spotlightColor,
    82→      }

    84→  }

```text
     1→import { vars } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→
     3→import type {
     4→  LinkCardData,
     5→  LinkCardFetchContext,
     6→  LinkCardPlugin,
     7→  UrlMatchResult,
     8→} from '../../types'
     9→import { camelcaseKeys, fetchJsonWithContext } from '../../utils'
    10→
    11→function getDifficultyColor(difficulty: string): string {
    12→  switch (difficulty) {
    13→    case 'Easy':
    14→      return '#00BFA5'
    15→    case 'Medium':
    16→      return '#FFA726'
    17→    case 'Hard':
    18→      return '#F44336'
    19→    default:
    20→      return '#757575'
    21→  }
    22→}
    23→
    24→export const leetcodePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    25→  name: 'leetcode',
    26→  displayName: 'LeetCode',
    27→  priority: 65,
    28→  typeClass: 'wide',
    29→  provider: 'leetcode',
    30→
    31→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    32→    if (url.hostname !== 'leetcode.cn' && url.hostname !== 'leetcode.com')
    33→      return null
    34→    const parts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
    35→    if (parts[0] !== 'problems' || !parts[1]) return null
    36→    return { id: parts[1], fullUrl: url.toString() }
    37→  },
    38→
    39→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    40→    return typeof id === 'string' && id.length > 0
    41→  },
    42→
    43→  async fetch(
    44→    id: string,
    45→    _meta?: Record<string, unknown>,
    46→    context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    47→  ): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    48→    const body = {
    49→      query: `query questionData($titleSlug: String!) {\n  question(titleSlug: $titleSlug) {translatedTitle\n   difficulty\n    likes\n     topicTags { translatedName\n }\n    stats\n  }\n}\n`,
    50→      variables: { titleSlug: id },
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    const questionData = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    54→      'https://leetcode.cn/graphql/',
    55→      context,
    56→      'leetcode',
    57→      {
    58→        method: 'POST',
    59→        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    60→        body: JSON.stringify(body),
    61→      },
    62→    )
    63→
    64→    const questionTitleData = camelcaseKeys(questionData.data.question)
    65→    const stats = JSON.parse(questionTitleData.stats)
    66→
    67→    return {
    68→      title: (
    69→        <span style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px' }}>
    70→          <span style={{ flex: 1 }}>{questionTitleData.translatedTitle}</span>
    71→          <span style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>
    72→            {questionTitleData.likes > 0 && (
    73→              <span
    74→                style={{
    75→                  display: 'inline-flex',
    76→                  alignItems: 'center',
    77→                  gap: '4px',
    78→                  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd,
    79→                  color: '#fb923c',
    80→                }}
    81→              >
    82→                👍
    83→                <span style={{ fontFamily: 'sans-serif', fontWeight: 500 }}>
    84→                  {questionTitleData.likes}
    85→                </span>
    86→              </span>
    87→            )}
    88→          </span>
    89→        </span>
    90→      ),
    91→      desc: (
    92→        <>
    93→          <span
    94→            style={{
    95→              marginRight: '16px',
    96→              fontWeight: 'bold',
    97→              color: getDifficultyColor(questionTitleData.difficulty),
    98→            }}
    99→          >
   100→            {questionTitleData.difficulty}
   101→          </span>
   102→          <span style={{ overflow: 'hidden' }}>
   103→            {questionTitleData.topicTags
   104→              .map((tag: any) => tag.translatedName)
   105→              .join(' / ')}
   106→          </span>
   107→          <span style={{ float: 'right', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
   108→            AR: {stats.acRate}
   109→          </span>
   110→        </>
   111→      ),
   112→      image:
   113→        'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/19/LeetCode_logo_black.png',
   114→      color: getDifficultyColor(questionTitleData.difficulty),
   115→    }
   116→  },
   117→}
   118→
```

```text
     1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from '../plugins'
     4→import type { LinkCardPlugin, PluginRegistry, UrlMatchResult } from '../types'
     5→
     6→export interface UrlMatchInfo {
     7→  plugin: LinkCardPlugin
     8→  match: UrlMatchResult
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function matchUrl(
    12→  url: string,
    13→  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
    14→): UrlMatchInfo | null {
    15→  try {
    16→    const parsed = new URL(url)
    17→    for (const plugin of pluginRegistry) {
    18→      const match = plugin.matchUrl(parsed)
    19→      if (match) return { plugin, match }
    20→    }
    21→  } catch {
    22→    // invalid URL
    23→  }
    24→  return null
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function useUrlMatcher(
    28→  url: string | undefined,
    29→  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
    30→): UrlMatchInfo | null {
    31→  return useMemo(() => {
    32→    if (!url) return null
    33→    return matchUrl(url, pluginRegistry)
    34→  }, [url, pluginRegistry])
    35→}
    36→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import type { LinkCardFetchContext } from './types'
     2→
     3→function toCamelCase(str: string): string {
     4→  return str.replaceAll(/_([a-z])/g, (_, c: string) => c.toUpperCase())
     5→}
     6→
     7→export function camelcaseKeys<T = any>(obj: any): T {
     8→  if (Array.isArray(obj)) return obj.map(camelcaseKeys) as T
     9→  if (obj !== null && typeof obj === 'object') {
    10→    return Object.fromEntries(
    11→      Object.entries(obj).map(([k, v]) => [toCamelCase(k), camelcaseKeys(v)]),
    12→    ) as T
    13→  }
    14→  return obj as T
    15→}
    16→
    17→export async function fetchJsonWithContext<T = any>(
    18→  url: string,
    19→  context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    20→  provider?: string,
    21→  init?: RequestInit,
    22→): Promise<T> {
    23→  const providerAdapter =
    24→    provider && context?.adapters ? context.adapters[provider] : undefined
    25→
    26→  if (providerAdapter) {
    27→    return providerAdapter.request<T>(url, init)
    28→  }
    29→
    30→  if (context?.fetchJson) {
    31→    return context.fetchJson<T>(url, init)
    32→  }
    33→
    34→  const response = await fetch(url, init)
    35→  if (!response.ok) {
    36→    throw new Error(`Request failed: ${response.status}`)
    37→  }
    38→  return response.json()
    39→}
    40→
    41→export async function fetchGitHubApi<T = any>(
    42→  url: string,
    43→  context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    44→): Promise<T> {
    45→  const path = url.replace('https://api.github.com', '')
    46→  return fetchJsonWithContext<T>(
    47→    `https://api.github.com${path}`,
    48→    context,
    49→    'github',
    50→  )
    51→}
    52→

    84→  matlab: '#e16737',
    85→  scala: '#c22d40',
    86→  sql: '#e38c00',
    87→  perl: '#0298c3',
    88→}
    89→
    90→export const bangumiTypeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    91→  subject: 'subjects',
    92→  character: 'characters',
    93→  person: 'persons',
    94→}
    95→export const allowedBangumiTypes = Object.keys(bangumiTypeMap)
    96→
    97→function hslToHex(h: number, s: number, l: number): string {
    98→  s /= 100
    99→  l /= 100
   100→  const a = s * Math.min(l, 1 - l)
   101→  const f = (n: number) => {
   102→    const k = (n + h / 30) % 12
   103→    const color = l - a * Math.max(Math.min(k - 3, 9 - k, 1), -1)
   104→    return Math.round(255 * color)
   105→      .toString(16)
   106→      .padStart(2, '0')
   107→  }
   108→  return `#${f(0)}${f(8)}${f(4)}`
   109→}
   110→
   111→export function generateColor(
   112→  str: string,
   113→  saturation: [number, number] = [30, 35],
   114→  lightness: [number, number] = [60, 70],
   115→): string {
   116→  let hash = 0
   117→  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
   118→    hash = str.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash)
   119→  }
   120→  const sRange = saturation[1] - saturation[0] + 1
   121→  const lRange = lightness[1] - lightness[0] + 1
   122→  const h = Math.abs(hash) % 360
   123→  const s = saturation[0] + (Math.abs(hash >> 8) % sRange)
   124→  const l = lightness[0] + (Math.abs(hash >> 16) % lRange)
   125→  return hslToHex(h, s, l)
   126→}
   127→
   128→export function stripMarkdown(text: string): string {
   129→  return text
   130→    .replaceAll(/!\[.*?\]\(.*?\)/g, '')
   131→    .replaceAll(/\[([^\]]*)\]\(.*?\)/g, '$1')
   132→    .replaceAll(/[*_~`#>]/g, '')
   133→    .replaceAll(/\n+/g, ' ')
   134→    .trim()
   135→}
   136→

```text
     1→import { vars } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→
     3→import type { LinkCardData, LinkCardPlugin, UrlMatchResult } from '../../types'
     4→import { camelcaseKeys, fetchGitHubApi } from '../../utils'
     5→
     6→const stateColors: Record<string, string> = {
     7→  open: '#238636',
     8→  closed: '#f85149',
     9→}
    10→
    11→const stateTextMap: Record<string, string> = {
    12→  open: 'Open',
    13→  closed: 'Closed',
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const githubIssuePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    17→  name: 'gh-issue',
    18→  displayName: 'GitHub Issue',
    19→  priority: 95,
    20→  typeClass: 'github',
    21→  provider: 'github',
    22→
    23→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    24→    if (url.hostname !== 'github.com') return null
    25→    if (!url.pathname.includes('/issues/')) return null
    26→    const parts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
    27→    if (parts.length < 4 || parts[2] !== 'issues') return null
    28→    const issueNumber = parts[3]
    29→    if (!/^\d+$/.test(issueNumber)) return null
    30→    const [owner, repo] = parts
    31→    return { id: `${owner}/${repo}/${issueNumber}`, fullUrl: url.toString() }
    32→  },
    33→
    34→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    35→    const parts = id.split('/')
    36→    return (
    37→      parts.length === 3 &&
    38→      parts.every((p) => p.length > 0) &&
    39→      /^\d+$/.test(parts[2])
    40→    )
    41→  },
    42→
    43→  async fetch(id: string, _meta, context): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    44→    const [owner, repo, issueNumber] = id.split('/')
    45→    const response = await fetchGitHubApi(
    46→      `https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/issues/${issueNumber}`,
    47→      context,
    48→    )
    49→    const data = camelcaseKeys(response)
    50→    const color = stateColors[data.state] || '#6b7280'
    51→    const stateText = stateTextMap[data.state] || data.state
    52→
    53→    return {
    54→      title: `Issue: ${data.title}`,
    55→      color,
    56→      desc: (
    57→        <span
    58→          style={{
    59→            display: 'flex',
    60→            flexWrap: 'wrap',
    61→            alignItems: 'center',
    62→            gap: '4px 12px',
    63→            fontFamily: vars.typography.fontMono,
    64→          }}
    65→        >
    66→          <span style={{ color }}>{stateText}</span>
    67→          <span style={{ fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd, opacity: 0.8 }}>
    68→            #{issueNumber} · {owner}/{repo}
    69→          </span>
    70→        </span>
    71→      ),
    72→      image: data.user?.avatarUrl,
    73→    }
    74→  },
    75→}
    76→
```

    11→const TMDB_LANGUAGE_BY_LOCALE: Record<string, string> = {

    16→
    17→const getCurrentLocale = () => {
    18→  if (typeof document !== 'undefined') {
    19→    const lang = document.documentElement?.lang?.trim()
    20→    if (lang) return lang
    21→  }
    22→  if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    23→    const firstSegment = window.location.pathname
    24→      .split('/')
    25→      .find((s) => s.length > 0)
    26→    if (firstSegment) return firstSegment
    27→  }
    28→  return 'en'
    29→}

    31→export const tmdbPlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {

    38→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    39→    if (!url.hostname.includes('themoviedb.org')) return null
    40→    const parts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
    41→    if (parts.length < 2) return null
    42→    const [type, realId] = parts
    43→    const canParsedTypes = ['tv', 'movie']
    44→    if (!canParsedTypes.includes(type) || !realId) return null
    45→    return { id: `${type}/${realId}`, fullUrl: url.toString(), meta: { type } }
    46→  },
    47→
    48→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    49→    const [type, realId] = id.split('/')
    50→    const canParsedTypes = ['tv', 'movie']
    51→    return canParsedTypes.includes(type) && realId?.length > 0
    52→  },
    53→
    54→  async fetch(
    55→    id: string,
    56→    _meta,
    57→    context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    58→  ): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    59→    const [type, realId] = id.split('/')
    60→    const locale = getCurrentLocale()
    61→    const userLanguage =
    62→      TMDB_LANGUAGE_BY_LOCALE[locale] ||
    63→      (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' ? navigator.language : 'en-US') ||
    64→      'en-US'
    65→
    66→    const json = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    67→      `https://api.themoviedb.org/3/${type}/${realId}?language=${userLanguage}`,
    68→      context,
    69→      'tmdb',
    70→    )
    71→
    72→    const title = type === 'tv' ? json.name : json.title
    73→    const originalTitle =
    74→      type === 'tv' ? json.original_name : json.original_title
    75→
    76→    return {
    77→      title: (
    78→        <span
    79→          style={{
    80→            display: 'flex',
    81→            flexWrap: 'wrap',
    82→            alignItems: 'flex-end',
    83→            gap: '8px',
    84→          }}
    85→        >
    86→          <span>{title}</span>
    87→          {title !== originalTitle && (
    88→            <span
    89→              style={{ fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd, opacity: 0.7 }}
    90→            >
    91→              ({originalTitle})
    92→            </span>
    93→          )}
    94→          <span
    95→            style={{
    96→              display: 'inline-flex',
    97→              flexShrink: 0,
    98→              alignItems: 'center',
    99→              gap: '4px',
   100→              alignSelf: 'center',
   101→              fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeXs,
   102→              color: '#fb923c',
   103→            }}
   104→          >
   105→            ★
   106→            <span style={{ fontFamily: 'sans-serif', fontWeight: 500 }}>
   107→              {json.vote_average > 0 && json.vote_average.toFixed(1)}
   108→            </span>
   109→          </span>
   110→        </span>
   111→      ),
   112→      desc: (
   113→        <span style={{ overflow: 'visible', whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }}>
   114→          {json.overview}
   115→        </span>
   116→      ),
   117→      image: `https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500${json.poster_path}`,
   118→      color: generateColor(title || originalTitle || id),
   119→      classNames: {
   120→        image: 'link-card__image--poster',
   121→        cardRoot: 'link-card--reversed',
   122→      },
   123→    }
   124→  },
   125→}

 `./packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/hooks/useCardFetcher.ts`

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
     3→
     4→import type {
     5→  LinkCardData,
     6→  LinkCardFetchContext,
     7→  LinkCardPlugin,
     8→} from '../types'
     9→
    10→export interface UseCardFetcherOptions {
    11→  source?: string
    12→  plugin?: LinkCardPlugin
    13→  id: string
    14→  fallbackUrl?: string
    15→  enabled?: boolean
    16→  context?: LinkCardFetchContext
    17→}
    18→
    19→export interface UseCardFetcherResult {
    20→  loading: boolean
    21→  isError: boolean
    22→  cardInfo: LinkCardData | undefined
    23→  fullUrl: string
    24→  isValid: boolean
    25→  ref: (node?: Element | null) => void
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function useCardFetcher(
    29→  options: UseCardFetcherOptions,
    30→): UseCardFetcherResult {
    31→  const { source, plugin, id, fallbackUrl, enabled = true, context } = options
    32→
    33→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    34→  const [isError, setIsError] = useState(false)
    35→  const [fullUrl] = useState(fallbackUrl || 'javascript:;')
    36→  const [cardInfo, setCardInfo] = useState<LinkCardData>()
    37→
    38→  const isValid = useMemo(() => {
    39→    if (!enabled || !plugin) return false
    40→    return plugin.isValidId(id)
    41→  }, [plugin, enabled, id])
    42→
    43→  const fetchInfo = useCallback(async () => {
    44→    if (!plugin || !isValid) return
    45→
    46→    setLoading(true)
    47→    setIsError(false)
    48→
    49→    try {
    50→      const data = await plugin.fetch(id, undefined, context)
    51→      setCardInfo(data)
    52→    } catch (err) {
    53→      console.error(
    54→        `[LinkCard] Error fetching ${source || plugin.name} data:`,
    55→        err,
    56→      )
    57→      setIsError(true)
    58→    } finally {
    59→      setLoading(false)
    60→    }
    61→  }, [context, plugin, isValid, id, source])
    62→
    63→  const { ref } = useInView({
    64→    triggerOnce: true,
    65→    onChange(inView) {
    66→      if (!inView || !enabled) return
    67→      fetchInfo()
    68→    },
    69→  })
    70→
    71→  return {
    72→    loading,
    73→    isError,
    74→    cardInfo,
    75→    fullUrl,
    76→    isValid,
    77→    ref,
    78→  }
    79→}
    80→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { pluginMap } from './plugins'
     2→import * as styles from './styles.css'
     3→
     4→export function LinkCardSkeleton({
     5→  source,
     6→  className,
     7→}: {
     8→  source?: string
     9→  className?: string
    10→}) {
    11→  const plugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
    12→  const typeClass = plugin?.typeClass
    13→  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
    14→  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
    15→    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
    16→    : ''
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <span
    20→      data-hide-print
    21→      data-source={source || undefined}
    22→      className={[
    23→        styles.card,
    24→        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
    25→        styles.cardSkeleton,
    26→        styles.semanticClassNames.cardSkeleton,
    27→        typeStyleClass,
    28→        typeSemanticClass,
    29→        className,
    30→      ]
    31→        .filter(Boolean)
    32→        .join(' ')}
    33→    >
    34→      <span className={`${styles.image} ${styles.semanticClassNames.image}`} />
    35→      <span
    36→        className={`${styles.content} ${styles.semanticClassNames.content}`}
    37→      >
    38→        <span className={`${styles.title} ${styles.semanticClassNames.title}`}>
    39→          <span
    40→            className={`${styles.titleText} ${styles.semanticClassNames.titleText}`}
    41→          />
    42→        </span>
    43→        <span className={`${styles.desc} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc}`} />
    44→        <span
    45→          className={`${styles.desc} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc} ${styles.desc2} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc2}`}
    46→        />
    47→      </span>
    48→    </span>
    49→  )
    50→}
    51→

```text
     1→import { vars } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→
     3→import type { LinkCardData, LinkCardPlugin, UrlMatchResult } from '../../types'
     4→
     5→export const arxivPlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
     6→  name: 'arxiv',
     7→  displayName: 'arXiv Paper',
     8→  priority: 80,
     9→  typeClass: 'academic',
    10→
    11→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    12→    if (url.hostname !== 'arxiv.org') return null
    13→    const match = url.pathname.match(/\/(abs|pdf)\/(\d{4}\.\d+(?:v\d+)?)/i)
    14→    if (!match) return null
    15→    return { id: match[2].toLowerCase(), fullUrl: url.toString() }
    16→  },
    17→
    18→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    19→    return /^\d{4}\.\d+(?:v\d+)?$/.test(id)
    20→  },
    21→
    22→  async fetch(id: string): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    23→    const response = await fetch(
    24→      `https://export.arxiv.org/api/query?id_list=${id}`,
    25→    )
    26→    const text = await response.text()
    27→    const parser = new DOMParser()
    28→    const xmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(text, 'application/xml')
    29→    const entry = xmlDoc.getElementsByTagName('entry')[0]
    30→    const title = entry.getElementsByTagName('title')[0].textContent
    31→    const authors = entry.getElementsByTagName('author')
    32→    const authorNames = Array.from(authors).map(
    33→      (author) => author.getElementsByTagName('name')[0].textContent,
    34→    )
    35→
    36→    return {
    37→      title: (
    38→        <span style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px' }}>
    39→          <span style={{ flex: 1 }}>{title}</span>
    40→          <span style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>
    41→            <span
    42→              style={{
    43→                display: 'inline-flex',
    44→                alignItems: 'center',
    45→                gap: '4px',
    46→                fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd,
    47→                color: '#fb923c',
    48→              }}
    49→            >
    50→              <span style={{ fontFamily: 'sans-serif', fontWeight: 500 }}>
    51→                {id}
    52→              </span>
    53→            </span>
    54→          </span>
    55→        </span>
    56→      ),
    57→      desc:
    58→        authorNames.length > 1 ? `${authorNames[0]} et al.` : authorNames[0],
    59→    }
    60→  },
    61→}
    62→

## Linkcard Plugin System & Demo Setup - Comprehensive Report

### 1. PluginRegistry Type Definition

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/types.ts`

```typescript
export type PluginRegistry = readonly LinkCardPlugin[]
```

The `PluginRegistry` is a read-only array of `LinkCardPlugin` objects, defined at line 109 of types.ts. Each element conforms to the `LinkCardPlugin` interface.

### 2. LinkCardPlugin Interface

**Location:** lines 67-104 in types.ts

```typescript
export interface LinkCardPlugin<TMeta = Record<string, unknown>> {
  /** 唯一标识符 */
  readonly name: string

  /** 可读名称（调试/文档用） */
  readonly displayName: string

  /** URL 匹配优先级（越高越先匹配） */
  readonly priority?: number

  /** 卡片样式类型 */
  readonly typeClass?: LinkCardTypeClass
  
  /** 插件依赖的 provider 名称，用于路由到对应请求适配器 */
  readonly provider?: string

  /**
   * 匹配 URL
   * @returns 匹配结果或 null
   */
  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null

  /**
   * 验证 ID 格式（支持显式 source 用法）
   */
  isValidId(id: string): boolean

  /**
   * 获取卡片数据
   * @param id - 解析后的标识符
   * @param meta - URL 匹配时的元数据
   * @param context - 运行时上下文（请求适配器、全局 fetcher 等）
   */
  fetch(
    id: string,
    meta?: TMeta,
    context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
  ): Promise<LinkCardData>
}
```

### 3. LinkCardTypeClass Union Type

**Location:** lines 56-62 in types.ts

```typescript
export type LinkCardTypeClass =
  | 'media'
  | 'github'
  | 'academic'
  | 'wide'
  | 'full'
```

Used to specify visual styling for different card categories.

### 6. GitHub Plugins Summary

| Plugin | Name | Priority | TypeClass | Provider | Hostname | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-----------|----------|----------|-------------|
| `githubRepoPlugin` | `gh-repo` | 100 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Repository info with star count |
| `githubCommitPlugin` | `gh-commit` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Commit with diff stats |
| `githubPrPlugin` | `gh-pr` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | PR with merge state & additions/deletions |
| `githubIssuePlugin` | `gh-issue` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Issue with state (open/closed) |
| `githubDiscussionPlugin` | `gh-discussion` | 95 | `github` | `github` | github.com | Discussion with category |

**Example: GitHub Repo Plugin (repo.tsx)**
- `matchUrl()`: Extracts owner/repo from URL path
- `isValidId()`: Validates format `owner/repo`
- `fetch()`: Calls GitHub API, renders title with star count, image with owner avatar
- Uses `camelcaseKeys()` for response transformation
- Uses `LanguageToColorMap` for language-based colors
- TypeClass: `'github'`, Provider: `'github'`

### 7. Media Plugins Summary

| Plugin | Name | Priority | TypeClass | Provider | Hostname | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-----------|----------|----------|-------------|
| `tmdbPlugin` | `tmdb` | 70 | `media` | `tmdb` | themoviedb.org | Movie/TV info with rating & poster |
| `bangumiPlugin` | `bangumi` | 70 | `media` | `bangumi` | bgm.tv / bangumi.tv | Anime/manga with ratings |
| `qqMusicPlugin` | `qq-music-song` | 60 | `wide` | `qq-music` | y.qq.com | QQ Music song with album art |
| `neteaseMusicPlugin` | `netease-music-song` | 60 | `wide` | `netease-music` | music.163.com | Netease song with album art |

**Key features:**
- TMDB & Bangumi use `classNames` to customize rendering:
  - `image: 'link-card__image--poster'` (portrait orientation)
  - `cardRoot: 'link-card--reversed'` (image on right)
- Music plugins return rich JSX with artist/album metadata

### 8. Academic & Code Plugins

| Plugin | Name | Priority | TypeClass | Provider | Hostname | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-----------|----------|----------|-------------|
| `arxivPlugin` | `arxiv` | 80 | `academic` | (none) | arxiv.org | Academic papers with authors |
| `leetcodePlugin` | `leetcode` | 65 | `wide` | `leetcode` | leetcode.cn / leetcode.com | LeetCode problem with difficulty |

**arxiv (arxiv.tsx):**
- No `provider` field (fetches directly)
- Uses DOMParser to parse XML response
- Returns title with paper ID, desc with author names

**leetcode (leetcode.tsx):**
- GraphQL POST request to `leetcode.cn/graphql/`
- Renders difficulty color-coded (Easy: green, Medium: orange, Hard: red)
- Returns JSX title with like count, desc with difficulty & tags

### 12. LinkCardRenderer Component Usage

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`

**Key implementation details (lines 49-220):**

```typescript
export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (props) => {
  const {
    url,
    title,
    description,
    favicon,
    image,
    source: explicitSource,
    id: explicitId,
    className,
    plugins = builtinPlugins,        // Default to built-in plugins
    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
  } = props

  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue

  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    () => new Map(plugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    [plugins],
  )

  // Match URL if no explicit source/id provided
  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    plugins,
  )
  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id

  // Fetch card data when dynamic fetch is enabled
  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    source,
    plugin: selectedPlugin,
    id: id || '',
    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
    context: fetchContext,
  })
  // ... renders skeleton during loading, error state, or final card
}
```

### 13. API Context Provider

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/FetchContext.tsx`

```typescript
const ctx = createContext<LinkCardFetchContext | undefined>(undefined)

export const LinkCardFetchProvider = ctx.Provider

export function useLinkCardFetchContext(): LinkCardFetchContext | undefined {
  return use(ctx)
}
```

Used to inject adapters and fetchers globally:
```tsx
<LinkCardFetchProvider value={{ adapters: { github: githubAdapter, ... } }}>
  <LinkCardRenderer url="..." />
</LinkCardFetchProvider>
```

export interface UrlMatchInfo {
  plugin: LinkCardPlugin
  match: UrlMatchResult
}

export function matchUrl(
  url: string,
  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,

export function useUrlMatcher(
  url: string | undefined,
  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,

Iterates through plugins in order and returns first match.

### 15. Utility Functions

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/utils.ts`

**Key utilities:**

1. **`camelcaseKeys<T>(obj: any): T`** - Converts snake_case keys to camelCase
2. **`fetchJsonWithContext<T>(url, context?, provider?, init?): Promise<T>`** - Routing logic:
   - Uses provider-specific adapter if available
   - Falls back to context.fetchJson if provided
   - Finally uses native fetch()
3. **`fetchGitHubApi<T>(url, context): Promise<T>`** - GitHub API helper
4. **`generateColor(str, saturation?, lightness?): string`** - Deterministic color from string hash
5. **`stripMarkdown(text): string`** - Removes markdown syntax
6. **`LanguageToColorMap`** - Language → hex color mapping (25+ languages)
7. **`bangumiTypeMap`** - Bangumi type mapping (subject/character/person)

1. **General Editor Demo:** `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/`
   - Uses `@haklex/rich-renderers` which includes linkcard
   - File: `src/fixtures/enhanced-renderers.ts` imports `enhancedRendererConfig`

2. **Integration:** Linkcard is bundled in:
   - `@haklex/rich-renderers` (static/read-only export)
   - `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` (full integration bundle)
   - `@haklex/rich-editor` (as default renderer)

3. **Production usage:** In `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/`
   - Uses `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` integration bundle
   - Provides `LinkCardFetchProvider` with custom adapters

### 17. Plugins Prop Usage Across Codebase

**Typical usage pattern:**

```tsx
// Custom plugins with fetch context
<LinkCardRenderer
  url="https://github.com/user/repo"
  plugins={customPlugins}                    // Optional: override default
  fetchContext={{
    adapters: {
      github: { request: githubFetch },
      tmdb: { request: tmdbFetch },
    }
  }}
/>

// Or with provider for global context
<LinkCardFetchProvider value={fetchContext}>
  <LinkCardRenderer url="..." />
</LinkCardFetchProvider>

// Explicit source + ID (skips URL matching)
<LinkCardRenderer
  source="gh-repo"
  id="innei/shiroi"
  url="https://github.com/innei/shiroi"
/>
```

### 18. LinkCardData Type

**File:** types.ts, lines 6-20

```typescript
export interface LinkCardData {
  /** 卡片标题 */
  title: ReactNode
  
  /** 卡片描述 */
  desc?: ReactNode
  
  /** 图片 URL */
  image?: string
  
  /** 高亮/主题色 (hex 格式) */
  color?: string
  
  /** CSS 类名覆盖 */
  classNames?: {
    image?: string
    cardRoot?: string
  }
}
```

Returned by every plugin's `fetch()` method. Supports both strings and JSX elements for rich formatting.

### 19. UrlMatchResult Type

**File:** types.ts, lines 25-32

```typescript
export interface UrlMatchResult {
  /** 解析后的 ID */
  id: string
  
  /** 完整 URL（用于链接跳转） */
  fullUrl?: string
  
  /** 额外元数据 */
  meta?: Record<string, unknown>
}
```

Returned by plugin's `matchUrl()` method.

### Summary

The linkcard plugin system is a flexible, extensible architecture where:

- **12 built-in plugins** handle GitHub (5), media (4), academic (1), code (1), and self-hosted (1) URLs
- **Plugins are prioritized** (100-10) for URL matching; highest priority matches first
- **TypeClasses** (`github`, `media`, `academic`, `wide`, `full`) control visual styling
- **Providers** route API requests to custom adapters via `LinkCardFetchContext`
- **`EnhancedLinkCardProps`** extends base renderer with `plugins`, `source`, `id`, and `fetchContext` props
- **No dedicated demo**; linkcard is tested via the general editor demo and production web app
- **Extensible via `createMxSpacePlugin()`** for custom self-hosted instances

     1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from '../plugins'
     4→import type { LinkCardPlugin, PluginRegistry, UrlMatchResult } from '../types'
     5→
     6→export interface UrlMatchInfo {
     7→  plugin: LinkCardPlugin
     8→  match: UrlMatchResult
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function matchUrl(
    12→  url: string,
    13→  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
    14→): UrlMatchInfo | null {
    15→  try {
    16→    const parsed = new URL(url)
    17→    for (const plugin of pluginRegistry) {
    18→      const match = plugin.matchUrl(parsed)
    19→      if (match) return { plugin, match }
    20→    }
    21→  } catch {
    22→    // invalid URL
    23→  }
    24→  return null
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function useUrlMatcher(
    28→  url: string | undefined,
    29→  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
    30→): UrlMatchInfo | null {
    31→  return useMemo(() => {
    32→    if (!url) return null
    33→    return matchUrl(url, pluginRegistry)
    34→  }, [url, pluginRegistry])
    35→}
    36→
```

     2→import { ShiroEditor, ShiroRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro'
     3→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→import { useCallback, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { JsonViewer } from '../components/JsonViewer'
     7→import { Panel } from '../components/Panel'
     8→import { useTheme } from '../context/ThemeContext'
     9→import { nodeSamples } from '../fixtures'
    10→
    11→export function NodeShowcase() {
    12→  const theme = useTheme()
    13→  const [variant, setVariant] = useState<RichEditorVariant>('article')
    14→  const [mode, setMode] = useState<'edit' | 'readonly'>('readonly')
    15→  const [liveStateByKey, setLiveStateByKey] = useState<
    16→    Record<string, SerializedEditorState>
    17→  >({})
    18→
    19→  const handleEditorChange = useCallback(
    20→    (key: string, state: SerializedEditorState) => {
    21→      setLiveStateByKey((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: state }))
    22→    },
    23→    [],
    24→  )
    25→
    26→  const inlineNodes = nodeSamples.filter((n) => n.category === 'inline')
    27→  const blockNodes = nodeSamples.filter((n) => n.category === 'block')
    28→  const containerNodes = nodeSamples.filter((n) => n.category === 'container')
    29→
    30→  return (
    31→    <div className="page">
    32→      <div className="showcase-intro">
    33→        <h2>Node Showcase</h2>
    34→        <p>
    35→          All custom node types rendered individually with their DSL
    36→          definitions, including Ruby annotations for Japanese furigana.
    37→        </p>
    38→      </div>
    39→
    40→      <div className="toolbar">
    41→        <div className="toolbar-group">
    42→          <span className="toolbar-label">Mode</span>
    43→          <button
    44→            className={mode === 'readonly' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    45→            onClick={() => setMode('readonly')}
    46→          >
    47→            Readonly
    48→          </button>
    49→          <button
    50→            className={mode === 'edit' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    51→            onClick={() => setMode('edit')}
    52→          >
    53→            Edit
    54→          </button>
    55→        </div>
    56→        <div className="toolbar-group">
    57→          <span className="toolbar-label">Variant</span>
    58→          <button
    59→            className={variant === 'article' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    60→            onClick={() => setVariant('article')}
    61→          >
    62→            Article
    63→          </button>
    64→          <button
    65→            className={variant === 'comment' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    66→            onClick={() => setVariant('comment')}
    67→          >
    68→            Comment
    69→          </button>
    70→          <button
    71→            className={variant === 'note' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    72→            onClick={() => setVariant('note')}
    73→          >
    74→            Note
    75→          </button>
    76→        </div>
    77→      </div>
    78→
    79→      {/* Inline Nodes */}
    80→      <section className="showcase-section">
    81→        <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Inline Nodes</h3>
    82→        <div className="showcase-grid">
    83→          {inlineNodes.map((sample) => (
    84→            <Panel
    85→              key={sample.key}
    86→              title={sample.label}
    87→              badge={sample.category}
    88→            >
    89→              <p className="node-description">{sample.description}</p>
    90→              <div className="node-render">
    91→                {mode === 'edit' ? (
    92→                  <ShiroEditor
    93→                    key={`${sample.key}-edit`}
    94→                    initialValue={sample.data}
    95→                    variant={variant}
    96→                    theme={theme}
    97→                    onChange={(state) => handleEditorChange(sample.key, state)}
    98→                  />
    99→                ) : (
   100→                  <ShiroRenderer
   101→                    value={sample.data}
   102→                    variant={variant}
   103→                    theme={theme}
   104→                  />
   105→                )}
   106→              </div>
   107→              <JsonViewer
   108→                data={
   109→                  mode === 'edit'
   110→                    ? (liveStateByKey[sample.key] ?? sample.data)
   111→                    : sample.data
   112→                }
   113→              />
   114→            </Panel>
   115→          ))}
   116→        </div>
   117→      </section>
   118→
   119→      {/* Block Nodes */}
   120→      <section className="showcase-section">
   121→        <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Block Nodes</h3>
   122→        <div className="showcase-grid">
   123→          {blockNodes.map((sample) => (
   124→            <Panel
   125→              key={sample.key}
   126→              title={sample.label}
   127→              badge={sample.category}
   128→            >
   129→              <p className="node-description">{sample.description}</p>
   130→              <div className="node-render">
   131→                {mode === 'edit' ? (
   132→                  <ShiroEditor
   133→                    key={`${sample.key}-edit`}
   134→                    initialValue={sample.data}
   135→                    variant={variant}
   136→                    theme={theme}
   137→                    onChange={(state) => handleEditorChange(sample.key, state)}
   138→                  />
   139→                ) : (
   140→                  <ShiroRenderer
   141→                    value={sample.data}
   142→                    variant={variant}
   143→                    theme={theme}
   144→                  />
   145→                )}
   146→              </div>
   147→              <JsonViewer
   148→                data={
   149→                  mode === 'edit'
   150→                    ? (liveStateByKey[sample.key] ?? sample.data)
   151→                    : sample.data
   152→                }
   153→              />
   154→            </Panel>
   155→          ))}
   156→        </div>
   157→      </section>
   158→
   159→      {/* Container Nodes */}
   160→      <section className="showcase-section">
   161→        <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Container Nodes</h3>
   162→        <div className="showcase-grid">
   163→          {containerNodes.map((sample) => (
   164→            <Panel
   165→              key={sample.key}
   166→              title={sample.label}
   167→              badge={sample.category}
   168→            >
   169→              <p className="node-description">{sample.description}</p>
   170→              <div className="node-render">
   171→                {mode === 'edit' ? (
   172→                  <ShiroEditor
   173→                    key={`${sample.key}-edit`}
   174→                    initialValue={sample.data}
   175→                    variant={variant}
   176→                    theme={theme}
   177→                    onChange={(state) => handleEditorChange(sample.key, state)}
   178→                  />
   179→                ) : (
   180→                  <ShiroRenderer
   181→                    value={sample.data}
   182→                    variant={variant}
   183→                    theme={theme}
   184→                  />
   185→                )}
   186→              </div>
   187→              <JsonViewer
   188→                data={
   189→                  mode === 'edit'
   190→                    ? (liveStateByKey[sample.key] ?? sample.data)
   191→                    : sample.data
   192→                }
   193→              />
   194→            </Panel>
   195→          ))}
   196→        </div>
   197→      </section>
   198→    </div>
   199→  )
   200→}
   201→

```text
     1→import 'modern-normalize/modern-normalize.css'
     2→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
     3→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style-renderer.css'
     4→import 'tldraw/tldraw.css'
     5→import './demo.css'
     6→
     7→import type { ColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     8→import { DialogStackProvider } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     9→import { TldrawConfigProvider } from '@haklex/rich-renderers/tldraw'
    10→import { Monitor, Moon, Sun } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { ThemeContext } from './context/ThemeContext'
    14→import { CommentsPage } from './pages/CommentsPage'
    15→import { DiffPage } from './pages/DiffPage'
    16→import { EditorPage } from './pages/EditorPage'
    17→import { NodeShowcase } from './pages/NodeShowcase'
    18→import { PresetsPage } from './pages/PresetsPage'
    19→
    20→type Page = 'editor' | 'comments' | 'nodes' | 'presets' | 'diff'
    21→type ThemeMode = 'system' | 'light' | 'dark'
    22→
    23→function useSystemColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    24→  const [scheme, setScheme] = useState<ColorScheme>(() =>
    25→    window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches
    26→      ? 'dark'
    27→      : 'light',
    28→  )
    29→
    30→  useEffect(() => {
    31→    const mq = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
    32→    const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) =>
    33→      setScheme(e.matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
    34→    mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
    35→    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
    36→  }, [])
    37→
    38→  return scheme
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function App() {
    42→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState<Page>(() => {
    43→    const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    44→    return hash === 'comments' ||
    45→      hash === 'nodes' ||
    46→      hash === 'presets' ||
    47→      hash === 'diff'
    48→      ? hash
    49→      : 'editor'
    50→  })
    51→  const [themeMode, setThemeMode] = useState<ThemeMode>('system')
    52→  const systemScheme = useSystemColorScheme()
    53→
    54→  const resolved: ColorScheme =
    55→    themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode
    56→
    57→  const dataTheme = useMemo(
    58→    () => (themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode),
    59→    [systemScheme, themeMode],
    60→  )
    61→
    62→  const cycleTheme = useCallback(() => {
    63→    setThemeMode((m) => {
    64→      if (m === 'system') return 'light'
    65→      if (m === 'light') return 'dark'
    66→      return 'system'
    67→    })
    68→  }, [])
    69→
    70→  const themeLabel =
    71→    themeMode === 'system' ? 'System' : themeMode === 'light' ? 'Light' : 'Dark'
    72→  const ThemeIcon =
    73→    themeMode === 'system' ? Monitor : themeMode === 'light' ? Sun : Moon
    74→
    75→  useEffect(() => {
    76→    const handleHashChange = () => {
    77→      const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    78→      const validPage =
    79→        hash === 'comments' ||
    80→        hash === 'nodes' ||
    81→        hash === 'presets' ||
    82→        hash === 'diff'
    83→          ? hash
    84→          : 'editor'
    85→      setCurrentPage(validPage)
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    89→    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    90→  }, [])
    91→
    92→  const navigate = (page: Page) => {
    93→    window.location.hash = page
    94→  }
    95→
    96→  const mockSaveSnapshot = useCallback(async (snapshot: object) => {
    97→    const json = JSON.stringify(snapshot)
    98→    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' })
    99→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   100→    console.log('[TldrawConfig] saveSnapshot → blob URL:', url)
   101→    return url
   102→  }, [])
   103→
   104→  return (
   105→    <ThemeContext value={resolved}>
   106→      <TldrawConfigProvider saveSnapshot={mockSaveSnapshot}>
   107→        <DialogStackProvider>
   108→          <div className="app" data-theme={dataTheme}>
   109→            <header className="app-header">
   110→              <div className="app-header-content">
   111→                <div>
   112→                  <h1 className="app-title">@haklex/rich-editor</h1>
   113→                  <p className="app-subtitle">
   114→                    Lexical-based rich text editor & renderer
   115→                  </p>
   116→                </div>
   117→                <nav className="app-nav">
   118→                  <button
   119→                    className={
   120→                      currentPage === 'editor'
   121→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   122→                        : 'nav-tab'
   123→                    }
   124→                    onClick={() => navigate('editor')}
   125→                  >
   126→                    Editor
   127→                  </button>
   128→                  <button
   129→                    className={
   130→                      currentPage === 'comments'
   131→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   132→                        : 'nav-tab'
   133→                    }
   134→                    onClick={() => navigate('comments')}
   135→                  >
   136→                    Comments
   137→                  </button>
   138→                  <button
   139→                    className={
   140→                      currentPage === 'nodes'
   141→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   142→                        : 'nav-tab'
   143→                    }
   144→                    onClick={() => navigate('nodes')}
   145→                  >
   146→                    Node Showcase
   147→                  </button>
   148→                  <button
   149→                    className={
   150→                      currentPage === 'presets'
   151→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   152→                        : 'nav-tab'
   153→                    }
   154→                    onClick={() => navigate('presets')}
   155→                  >
   156→                    Presets
   157→                  </button>
   158→                  <button
   159→                    className={
   160→                      currentPage === 'diff'
   161→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   162→                        : 'nav-tab'
   163→                    }
   164→                    onClick={() => navigate('diff')}
   165→                  >
   166→                    Diff
   167→                  </button>
   168→                  <div className="nav-divider" />
   169→                  <button
   170→                    className="nav-theme-toggle"
   171→                    onClick={cycleTheme}
   172→                    title={themeLabel}
   173→                  >
   174→                    <ThemeIcon size={18} />
   175→                  </button>
   176→                </nav>
   177→              </div>
   178→            </header>
   179→
   180→            <main className="app-main">
   181→              {currentPage === 'editor' && <EditorPage />}
   182→              {currentPage === 'comments' && <CommentsPage />}
   183→              {currentPage === 'nodes' && <NodeShowcase />}
   184→              {currentPage === 'presets' && <PresetsPage />}
   185→              {currentPage === 'diff' && <DiffPage />}
   186→            </main>
   187→          </div>
   188→        </DialogStackProvider>
   189→      </TldrawConfigProvider>
   190→    </ThemeContext>
   191→  )
   192→}
   193→
```
</details></tool-use>
