     1→import type { LinkCardRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { Globe } from 'lucide-react'
     3→import type { ComponentType } from 'react'
     4→import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useLinkCardFetchContext } from './FetchContext'
     7→import { useCardFetcher } from './hooks/useCardFetcher'
     8→import { useUrlMatcher } from './hooks/useUrlMatcher'
     9→import { LinkCardSkeleton } from './LinkCardSkeleton'
    10→import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from './plugins'
    11→import * as styles from './styles.css'
    12→import type { LinkCardFetchContext, PluginRegistry } from './types'
    13→
    14→export interface EnhancedLinkCardProps extends LinkCardRendererProps {
    15→  source?: string
    16→  id?: string
    17→  className?: string
    18→  /**
    19→   * 额外插件，与内置插件合并（同名覆盖内置，按 priority 排序）
    20→   */
    21→  plugins?: PluginRegistry
    22→  fetchContext?: LinkCardFetchContext
    23→}
    24→
    25→function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
    26→  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)
    27→
    28→  return (
    29→    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
    30→      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (
    31→        <img src={favicon} alt="" onError={() => setFaviconFailed(true)} />
    32→      ) : (
    33→        <Globe aria-hidden="true" />
    34→      )}
    35→    </span>
    36→  )
    37→}
    38→
    39→function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
    40→  if (!classNames) return ''
    41→  return classNames
    42→    .split(/\s+/)
    43→    .filter(Boolean)
    44→    .map((cls) =>
    45→      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
    46→        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
    47→        : cls,
    48→    )
    49→    .join(' ')
    50→}
    51→
    52→export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (
    53→  props,
    54→) => {
    55→  const {
    56→    url,
    57→    title,
    58→    description,
    59→    favicon,
    60→    image,
    61→    source: explicitSource,
    62→    id: explicitId,
    63→    className,
    64→    plugins: extraPlugins,
    65→    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
    66→  } = props
    67→
    68→  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
    69→  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue
    70→
    71→  const mergedPlugins = useMemo(() => {
    72→    if (!extraPlugins || extraPlugins.length === 0) return builtinPlugins
    73→    const map = new Map(builtinPlugins.map((p) => [p.name, p]))
    74→    for (const plugin of extraPlugins) {
    75→      map.set(plugin.name, plugin)
    76→    }
    77→    return [...map.values()].sort(
    78→      (a, b) => (b.priority ?? 0) - (a.priority ?? 0),
    79→    )
    80→  }, [extraPlugins])
    81→
    82→  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    83→    () => new Map(mergedPlugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    84→    [mergedPlugins],
    85→  )
    86→
    87→  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    88→    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    89→    mergedPlugins,
    90→  )
    91→  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
    92→  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id
    93→  const matchedFullUrl = urlMatch?.match.fullUrl
    94→
    95→  const useDynamicFetch = !!source && !!id
    96→  const selectedPlugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
    97→  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    98→    source,
    99→    plugin: selectedPlugin,
   100→    id: id || '',
   101→    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
   102→    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
   103→    context: fetchContext,
   104→  })
   105→
   106→  const typeClass = selectedPlugin?.typeClass
   107→  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
   108→  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
   109→    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
   110→    : ''
   111→
   112→  const finalTitle = cardInfo?.title || title || url
   113→  const finalDesc = cardInfo?.desc || description
   114→  const finalImage = cardInfo?.image || image
   115→  const finalColor = cardInfo?.color
   116→  const classNames = cardInfo?.classNames || {}
   117→  const mappedCardRootClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.cardRoot)
   118→  const mappedImageClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.image)
   119→
   120→  const [shortDesc, setShortDesc] = useState(false)
   121→  const descRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)
   122→
   123→  useEffect(() => {
   124→    const el = descRef.current
   125→    if (!el || !finalDesc) {
   126→      setShortDesc(false)
   127→      return
   128→    }
   129→    const style = getComputedStyle(el)
   130→    const lineHeight = Number.parseFloat(style.lineHeight) || 1.5 * 14
   131→    const maxTwoLines = lineHeight * 2
   132→    setShortDesc(el.scrollHeight <= maxTwoLines + 1)
   133→  }, [finalDesc, finalTitle])
   134→
   135→  if (useDynamicFetch && !isValid) {
   136→    return null
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  if (useDynamicFetch && loading) {
   140→    return (
   141→      <a
   142→        data-hide-print
   143→        ref={ref}
   144→        href={fullUrl}
   145→        target="_blank"
   146→        rel="noopener noreferrer"
   147→      >
   148→        <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
   149→      </a>
   150→    )
   151→  }
   152→
   153→  const hasImage = !!finalImage
   154→  const showImagePlaceholder = useDynamicFetch && isError && !hasImage
   155→
   156→  return (
   157→    <a
   158→      data-hide-print
   159→      ref={useDynamicFetch ? ref : undefined}
   160→      className={[
   161→        styles.card,
   162→        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
   163→        typeStyleClass,
   164→        typeSemanticClass,
   165→        shortDesc && styles.cardShortDesc,
   166→        shortDesc && styles.semanticClassNames.cardShortDesc,
   167→        useDynamicFetch && (loading || isError) && styles.cardSkeleton,
   168→        useDynamicFetch &&
   169→          (loading || isError) &&
   170→          styles.semanticClassNames.cardSkeleton,
   171→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.cardError,
   172→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.semanticClassNames.cardError,
   173→        'not-prose',
   174→        className,
   175→        mappedCardRootClass,
   176→      ]
   177→        .filter(Boolean)
   178→        .join(' ')}
   179→      data-source={source || undefined}
   180→      href={useDynamicFetch ? fullUrl : url}
   181→      target="_blank"
   182→      rel="noopener noreferrer"
   183→      style={{
   184→        borderColor: finalColor ? `${finalColor}30` : undefined,
   185→      }}
   186→    >
   187→      {finalColor && (
   188→        <div
   189→          className={`${styles.bg} ${styles.semanticClassNames.bg}`}
   190→          style={{
   191→            backgroundColor: finalColor,
   192→            opacity: 0.04,
   193→          }}
   194→        />
   195→      )}
   196→      {hasImage || showImagePlaceholder ? (
   197→        <span
   198→          className={[
   199→            styles.image,
   200→            styles.semanticClassNames.image,
   201→            mappedImageClass,
   202→          ]
   203→            .filter(Boolean)
   204→            .join(' ')}
   205→          data-image={finalImage || ''}
   206→          style={{
   207→            backgroundImage: finalImage ? `url(${finalImage})` : undefined,
   208→          }}
   209→        />
   210→      ) : (
   211→        <FallbackIcon favicon={favicon} />
   212→      )}
   213→      <span
   214→        className={`${styles.content} ${styles.semanticClassNames.content}`}
   215→      >
   216→        <span className={`${styles.title} ${styles.semanticClassNames.title}`}>
   217→          <span
   218→            className={`${styles.titleText} ${styles.semanticClassNames.titleText}`}
   219→          >
   220→            {finalTitle}
   221→          </span>
   222→        </span>
   223→        {finalDesc && (
   224→          <span
   225→            ref={descRef}
   226→            className={`${styles.desc} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc}`}
   227→          >
   228→            {finalDesc}
   229→          </span>
   230→        )}
   231→      </span>
   232→    </a>
   233→  )
   234→}
   235→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import type {
     2→  LinkCardData,
     3→  LinkCardFetchContext,
     4→  LinkCardPlugin,
     5→  UrlMatchResult,
     6→} from '../../types'
     7→import { fetchJsonWithContext, generateColor, stripMarkdown } from '../../utils'
     8→
     9→export interface MxSpacePluginConfig {
    10→  webUrl: string
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function createMxSpacePlugin(
    14→  config: MxSpacePluginConfig,
    15→): LinkCardPlugin {
    16→  const webHost = new URL(config.webUrl).hostname
    17→
    18→  return {
    19→    name: 'self',
    20→    displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    21→    priority: 10,
    22→    provider: 'mx-space',
    23→
    24→    matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    25→      if (webHost !== url.hostname) return null
    26→      if (
    27→        !url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/') &&
    28→        !url.pathname.startsWith('/notes/')
    29→      ) {
    30→        return null
    31→      }
    32→      return { id: url.pathname.slice(1), fullUrl: url.toString() }
    33→    },
    34→
    35→    isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    36→      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    37→      if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') return false
    38→      if (type === 'posts') return rest.length === 2
    39→      return rest.length === 1
    40→    },
    41→
    42→    async fetch(
    43→      id: string,
    44→      _meta?: Record<string, unknown>,
    45→      context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    46→    ): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    47→      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    48→      let data: {
    49→        title: string
    50→        text: string
    51→        images?: { src: string }[]
    52→        meta?: Record<string, any>
    53→        cover?: string
    54→        summary?: string | null
    55→      } = { title: '', text: '' }
    56→
    57→      if (type === 'posts') {
    58→        const [cate, slug] = rest
    59→        data = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    60→          `posts/${cate}/${slug}`,
    61→          context,
    62→          'mx-space',
    63→        )
    64→      } else if (type === 'notes') {
    65→        const [nid] = rest
    66→        const response = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    67→          `notes/${nid}`,
    68→          context,
    69→          'mx-space',
    70→        )
    71→        data = response.data || response
    72→      }
    73→
    74→      const coverImage = data.cover || data.meta?.cover
    75→      const spotlightColor = generateColor(data.title)
    76→
    77→      return {
    78→        title: data.title,
    79→        desc: data.summary || `${stripMarkdown(data.text).slice(0, 50)}...`,
    80→        image: coverImage || data.images?.[0]?.src,
    81→        color: spotlightColor,
    82→      }
    83→    },
    84→  }
    85→}
    86→
    87→export const mxSpacePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    88→  name: 'self',
    89→  displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    90→  priority: 10,
    91→  provider: 'mx-space',
    92→
    93→  matchUrl(_url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    94→    return null
    95→  },
    96→
    97→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    98→    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    99→    if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') return false
   100→    if (type === 'posts') return rest.length === 2
   101→    return rest.length === 1
   102→  },
   103→
   104→  async fetch(

   118→
   119→    if (type === 'posts') {

   121→      data = await fetchJsonWithContext(

     1→import type { SerializedEditorState, SerializedLexicalNode } from 'lexical'
     2→
     3→// Re-export common node types (defined inline to avoid Lexical package import issues)
     4→type SerializedTextNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
     5→  type: 'text'
     6→  text: string
     7→  format: number
     8→  detail: number
     9→  mode: 'normal' | 'token' | 'segmented'
    10→  style: string
    11→}
    12→
    13→type SerializedParagraphNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    14→  type: 'paragraph'
    15→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    16→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    17→  format: string
    18→  indent: number
    19→  textFormat: number
    20→  textStyle: string
    21→}
    22→
    23→type SerializedHeadingNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    24→  type: 'heading'
    25→  tag: 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    26→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    27→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    28→  format: string
    29→  indent: number
    30→}
    31→
    32→type SerializedQuoteNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    33→  type: 'quote'
    34→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    35→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    36→  format: string
    37→  indent: number
    38→}
    39→
    40→type SerializedListNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    41→  type: 'list'
    42→  listType: 'bullet' | 'number'
    43→  start: number
    44→  tag: 'ul' | 'ol'
    45→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    46→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    47→  format: string
    48→  indent: number
    49→}
    50→
    51→type SerializedListItemNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    52→  type: 'listitem'

    54→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    55→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    56→  format: string
    57→  indent: number
    58→}
    59→
    60→type SerializedLinkNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {

    63→  rel: string | null
    64→  target: string | null
    65→  title: string | null

    71→
    72→// Text formats (bitwise flags)
    73→export const FORMAT_BOLD = 1
    74→export const FORMAT_ITALIC = 1 << 1
    75→export const FORMAT_STRIKETHROUGH = 1 << 2
    76→export const FORMAT_UNDERLINE = 1 << 3
    77→export const FORMAT_CODE = 1 << 4
    78→export const FORMAT_SUBSCRIPT = 1 << 5
    79→export const FORMAT_SUPERSCRIPT = 1 << 6
    80→export const FORMAT_HIGHLIGHT = 1 << 7
    81→
    82→export function text(content: string, format = 0): SerializedTextNode {
    83→  return {
    84→    detail: 0,
    85→    format,
    86→    mode: 'normal',
    87→    style: '',
    88→    text: content,

    94→export function paragraph(

     8→
     9→type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11→    infer P extends object
    12→  >
    13→    ? P
    14→    : never
    15→}
    16→

    18→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<

    20→  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21→    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22→    : never
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26→  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27→    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28→    rendererKey: K
    29→    /** Default renderer component */
    30→    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31→    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32→    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33→  }
    34→}[RendererKey]
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38→ * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39→ */
    40→export function RendererWrapper({
    41→  rendererKey,
    42→  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43→  props,
    44→}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45→  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46→  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47→
    48→  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→/**
    52→ * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53→ * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54→ */
    55→export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56→  rendererKey: K,
    57→  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58→  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59→): ReactElement {
    60→  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61→    rendererKey,
    62→    defaultRenderer,
    63→    props,
    64→  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65→}

```tsx
/**
 * Demo: 业务扩展 LinkCard 插件
 *
 * 展示如何创建自定义 LinkCardPlugin 并通过 plugins prop 合并到内置插件中。
 * 传入的 plugins 会与内置 12 个插件合并（同名覆盖，按 priority 排序）。
 */
import type {
  LinkCardData,
  LinkCardPlugin,
  PluginRegistry,
  UrlMatchResult,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderer-linkcard/static'

/**
 * 示例 1: 豆瓣读书插件
 * 匹配 book.douban.com/subject/{id} URL，返回 mock 书籍卡片数据
 */
export const doubanBookPlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
  name: 'douban-book',
  displayName: 'Douban Book',
  priority: 75,
  typeClass: 'media',
  provider: 'douban',

  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    if (url.hostname !== 'book.douban.com') return null
    const match = url.pathname.match(/^\/subject\/(\d+)/)
    if (!match) return null
    return { id: match[1], fullUrl: url.toString() }
  },

  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    return /^\d+$/.test(id)
  },

  async fetch(id: string): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    // Mock data for demo
    return {
      title: `《代码大全》`,
      desc: `豆瓣评分 9.3 · Steve McConnell · 软件开发的百科全书 (ID: ${id})`,
      image: `https://picsum.photos/seed/douban-${id}/200/280`,
      color: '#319046',
      classNames: {
        image: 'link-card__image--poster',
        cardRoot: 'link-card--reversed',
      },
    }
  },
}

/**
 * 示例 2: 内部工单系统插件
 * 匹配 issues.example.com/PROJ-{number} 格式
 */
export const internalIssuePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
  name: 'internal-issue',
  displayName: 'Internal Issue Tracker',
  priority: 50,

  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    if (url.hostname !== 'issues.example.com') return null
    const match = url.pathname.match(/^\/([\w-]+-\d+)/)
    if (!match) return null
    return { id: match[1], fullUrl: url.toString() }
  },

  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    return /^[\w-]+-\d+$/.test(id)
  },

  async fetch(id: string): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    return {
      title: `${id}: Implement dark mode for dashboard`,
      desc: 'Status: In Progress · Assignee: @innei · Sprint 24',
      color: '#6366f1',
    }
  },
}

/**
 * 示例 3: 覆盖内置 GitHub repo 插件（同名 "gh-repo" 替换内置）
 * 演示同名覆盖机制
 */
export const customGithubRepoPlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
  name: 'gh-repo',
  displayName: 'Custom GitHub Repo',
  priority: 100,
  typeClass: 'github',

  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    if (url.hostname !== 'github.com') return null
    const parts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
    if (parts.length !== 2) return null
    return { id: `${parts[0]}/${parts[1]}`, fullUrl: url.toString() }
  },

  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    return /^[\w.-]+\/[\w.-]+$/.test(id)
  },

  async fetch(id: string): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    return {
      title: `${id} (custom plugin)`,
      desc: 'This card is rendered by the overridden gh-repo plugin',
      image: `https://opengraph.githubassets.com/1/${id}`,
      color: '#238636',
    }
  },
}

/**
 * 导出业务扩展插件列表
 * 使用方式：<LinkCardRenderer plugins={extraLinkCardPlugins} />
 * 内部会与 12 个内置插件合并（同名覆盖，按 priority 排序）
 */
export const extraLinkCardPlugins: PluginRegistry = [
  doubanBookPlugin,
  internalIssuePlugin,
]

import { LinkCardRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-renderer-linkcard/static'
import { useState } from 'react'

import { Panel } from '../components/Panel'
import { useTheme } from '../context/ThemeContext'
import {
  customGithubRepoPlugin,
  doubanBookPlugin,
  extraLinkCardPlugins,
  internalIssuePlugin,
} from '../fixtures/extra-linkcard-plugins'

const demoCards = [
  {
    key: 'douban',
    label: 'Douban Book (custom plugin)',
    url: 'https://book.douban.com/subject/1477390',
    description:
      'doubanBookPlugin 匹配 book.douban.com，与内置 12 个插件合并后生效',
  },
  {
    key: 'issue',
    label: 'Internal Issue (custom plugin)',
    url: 'https://issues.example.com/PROJ-1234',
    description:
      'internalIssuePlugin 匹配 issues.example.com，新增插件不影响内置',
  },
  {
    key: 'github',
    label: 'GitHub Repo (builtin)',
    url: 'https://github.com/facebook/react',
    description: '内置 gh-repo 插件自动匹配，无需额外配置',
  },
  {
    key: 'github-override',
    label: 'GitHub Repo (overridden)',
    url: 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js',
    description:
      '传入同名 "gh-repo" 插件覆盖内置实现，卡片标题带 (custom plugin) 标记',
    useOverride: true,
  },
  {
    key: 'static',
    label: 'Static fallback (no plugin match)',
    url: 'https://example.com/article',
    title: 'Example Article',
    description: '无插件匹配时降级为静态 props 渲染',
    staticFallback: true,
  },
] as const

export function LinkCardPluginsPage() {
  const theme = useTheme()
  const [showOverride, setShowOverride] = useState(false)

  return (
    <div className="page">
      <div className="showcase-intro">
        <h2>LinkCard Plugin Extension Demo</h2>
        <p>
          <code>plugins</code> prop 传入的插件会与内置 12
          个插件合并（同名覆盖，按 priority 排序）。
          业务方只需提供额外插件，无需重复声明内置插件。
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="toolbar">
        <div className="toolbar-group">
          <span className="toolbar-label">Override</span>
          <button
            className={showOverride ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
            onClick={() => setShowOverride((v) => !v)}
          >
            Override gh-repo
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <section className="showcase-section">
        <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Extra Plugins (merge)</h3>
        <p style={{ margin: '0 0 16px', opacity: 0.7, fontSize: 14 }}>
          plugins={'{[doubanBookPlugin, internalIssuePlugin]}'} — 合并后共{' '}
          {12 + extraLinkCardPlugins.length} 个插件
        </p>
        <div
          className="showcase-grid"
          data-theme={theme}
          style={{ gap: 16 }}
        >
          {demoCards
            .filter((c) => !c.useOverride || showOverride)
            .map((card) => (
              <Panel key={card.key} title={card.label} badge="linkcard">
                <p className="node-description">{card.description}</p>
                <div className="node-render" style={{ marginTop: 8 }}>
                  <LinkCardRenderer
                    url={card.url}
                    title={'staticFallback' in card ? card.title : undefined}
                    plugins={
                      card.useOverride
                        ? [...extraLinkCardPlugins, customGithubRepoPlugin]
                        : extraLinkCardPlugins
                    }
                  />
                </div>
              </Panel>
            ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="showcase-section">
        <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Plugin Source</h3>
        <pre
          style={{
            padding: 16,
            borderRadius: 8,
            overflow: 'auto',
            fontSize: 13,
            lineHeight: 1.6,
            background: 'var(--bg-secondary, #f5f5f5)',
          }}
        >
          {`import type { LinkCardPlugin, PluginRegistry } from '@haklex/rich-renderer-linkcard/static'

// 1. 定义业务插件
const doubanBookPlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
  name: 'douban-book',
  displayName: 'Douban Book',
  priority: 75,
  typeClass: 'media',
  matchUrl(url) {
    if (url.hostname !== 'book.douban.com') return null
    const m = url.pathname.match(/^\\/subject\\/(\\d+)/)
    return m ? { id: m[1], fullUrl: url.toString() } : null
  },
  isValidId: (id) => /^\\d+$/.test(id),
  async fetch(id) {
    const data = await fetchBookInfo(id)
    return { title: data.title, desc: data.rating, image: data.cover }
  },
}

// 2. 传入 plugins — 自动与内置 12 个插件合并
<LinkCardRenderer
  url="https://book.douban.com/subject/1477390"
  plugins={[doubanBookPlugin]}
/>`}
        </pre>
      </section>
    </div>
  )
}

```

     6→
     7→import type { ColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     8→import { DialogStackProvider } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     9→import { TldrawConfigProvider } from '@haklex/rich-renderers/tldraw'
    10→import { Monitor, Moon, Sun } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { ThemeContext } from './context/ThemeContext'
    14→import { CommentsPage } from './pages/CommentsPage'
    15→import { DiffPage } from './pages/DiffPage'
    16→import { EditorPage } from './pages/EditorPage'
    17→import { NodeShowcase } from './pages/NodeShowcase'
    18→import { LinkCardPluginsPage } from './pages/LinkCardPluginsPage'
    19→import { PresetsPage } from './pages/PresetsPage'
    20→
    21→type Page = 'editor' | 'comments' | 'nodes' | 'presets' | 'diff' | 'linkcard'
    22→type ThemeMode = 'system' | 'light' | 'dark'
    23→
    24→function useSystemColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    25→  const [scheme, setScheme] = useState<ColorScheme>(() =>
    26→    window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches
    27→      ? 'dark'
    28→      : 'light',
    29→  )
    30→
    31→  useEffect(() => {
    32→    const mq = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
    33→    const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) =>
    34→      setScheme(e.matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
    35→    mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
    36→    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
    37→  }, [])
    38→
    39→  return scheme
    40→}
    41→
    42→export function App() {
    43→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState<Page>(() => {
    44→    const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    45→    return hash === 'comments' ||
    46→      hash === 'nodes' ||
    47→      hash === 'presets' ||
    48→      hash === 'diff' ||
    49→      hash === 'linkcard'
    50→      ? hash
    51→      : 'editor'
    52→  })
    53→  const [themeMode, setThemeMode] = useState<ThemeMode>('system')
    54→  const systemScheme = useSystemColorScheme()
    55→
    56→  const resolved: ColorScheme =
    57→    themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode
    58→
    59→  const dataTheme = useMemo(
    60→    () => (themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode),
    61→    [systemScheme, themeMode],
    62→  )
    63→
    64→  const cycleTheme = useCallback(() => {
    65→    setThemeMode((m) => {
    66→      if (m === 'system') return 'light'
    67→      if (m === 'light') return 'dark'
    68→      return 'system'
    69→    })
    70→  }, [])
    71→
    72→  const themeLabel =
    73→    themeMode === 'system' ? 'System' : themeMode === 'light' ? 'Light' : 'Dark'
    74→  const ThemeIcon =
    75→    themeMode === 'system' ? Monitor : themeMode === 'light' ? Sun : Moon
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    const handleHashChange = () => {
    79→      const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    80→      const validPage =
    81→        hash === 'comments' ||
    82→        hash === 'nodes' ||
    83→        hash === 'presets' ||
    84→        hash === 'diff' ||
    85→        hash === 'linkcard'
    86→          ? hash
    87→          : 'editor'
    88→      setCurrentPage(validPage)
    89→    }
    90→
    91→    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    92→    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    93→  }, [])
    94→
    95→  const navigate = (page: Page) => {
    96→    window.location.hash = page
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  const mockSaveSnapshot = useCallback(async (snapshot: object) => {
   100→    const json = JSON.stringify(snapshot)
   101→    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' })
   102→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   103→    console.log('[TldrawConfig] saveSnapshot → blob URL:', url)
   104→    return url
   105→  }, [])
   106→
   107→  return (
   108→    <ThemeContext value={resolved}>
   109→      <TldrawConfigProvider saveSnapshot={mockSaveSnapshot}>
   110→        <DialogStackProvider>
   111→          <div className="app" data-theme={dataTheme}>
   112→            <header className="app-header">
   113→              <div className="app-header-content">
   114→                <div>
   115→                  <h1 className="app-title">@haklex/rich-editor</h1>
   116→                  <p className="app-subtitle">
   117→                    Lexical-based rich text editor & renderer
   118→                  </p>
   119→                </div>
   120→                <nav className="app-nav">
   121→                  <button
   122→                    className={
   123→                      currentPage === 'editor'
   124→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   125→                        : 'nav-tab'
   126→                    }
   127→                    onClick={() => navigate('editor')}
   128→                  >
   129→                    Editor
   130→                  </button>
   131→                  <button
   132→                    className={
   133→                      currentPage === 'comments'
   134→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   135→                        : 'nav-tab'
   136→                    }
   137→                    onClick={() => navigate('comments')}
   138→                  >
   139→                    Comments
   140→                  </button>
   141→                  <button
   142→                    className={
   143→                      currentPage === 'nodes'
   144→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   145→                        : 'nav-tab'
   146→                    }
   147→                    onClick={() => navigate('nodes')}
   148→                  >
   149→                    Node Showcase
   150→                  </button>
   151→                  <button
   152→                    className={
   153→                      currentPage === 'presets'
   154→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   155→                        : 'nav-tab'
   156→                    }
   157→                    onClick={() => navigate('presets')}
   158→                  >
   159→                    Presets
   160→                  </button>
   161→                  <button

   164→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'

   167→                    onClick={() => navigate('diff')}
   168→                  >

   179→                    LinkCard

   182→                  <button

   184→                    onClick={cycleTheme}
   185→                    title={themeLabel}
   186→                  >

   188→                  </button>
   189→                </nav>
   190→              </div>
   191→            </header>
   192→
   193→            <main className="app-main">
   194→              {currentPage === 'editor' && <EditorPage />}
   195→              {currentPage === 'comments' && <CommentsPage />}
   196→              {currentPage === 'nodes' && <NodeShowcase />}
   197→              {currentPage === 'presets' && <PresetsPage />}
   198→              {currentPage === 'diff' && <DiffPage />}
   199→              {currentPage === 'linkcard' && <LinkCardPluginsPage />}
   200→            </main>
   201→          </div>
   202→        </DialogStackProvider>
   203→      </TldrawConfigProvider>
   204→    </ThemeContext>
   205→  )
   206→}

**3. `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/LinkCardPluginsPage.tsx`** — 新增

独立 demo 页面，展示:
- 自定义插件与内置插件合并渲染

```text
     1→import RemoveMarkdown from 'remove-markdown'
     2→import uniqolor from 'uniqolor'
     3→
     4→import { getWebUrl } from '~/atoms'
     5→import { getDominantColor } from '~/lib/image'
     6→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     7→
     8→import type { LinkCardData, LinkCardPlugin, UrlMatchResult } from '../../types'
     9→
    10→export const mxSpacePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    11→  name: 'self',
    12→  displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    13→  priority: 10, // Low priority - catch internal links last
    14→
    15→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    16→    // Check if it's a self URL
    17→    const webUrl = getWebUrl()
    18→    const webHost = webUrl ? new URL(webUrl).hostname : ''
    19→
    20→    const isSelfHost = webHost === url.hostname
    21→
    22→    if (!isSelfHost) return null
    23→
    24→    // Check for posts or notes paths
    25→    if (
    26→      !url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/') &&
    27→      !url.pathname.startsWith('/notes/')
    28→    ) {
    29→      return null
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    return {
    33→      id: url.pathname.slice(1), // Remove leading slash
    34→      fullUrl: url.toString(),
    35→    }
    36→  },
    37→
    38→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    39→    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    40→    if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') {
    41→      return false
    42→    }
    43→    if (type === 'posts') {
    44→      return rest.length === 2
    45→    }
    46→    return rest.length === 1
    47→  },
    48→
    49→  async fetch(id: string): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    50→    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    51→
    52→    let data: {
    53→      title: string
    54→      text?: string
    55→      images?: { src: string }[]
    56→      meta?: Record<string, any> | null
    57→      cover?: string
    58→      summary?: string | null
    59→    } = { title: '', text: '' }
    60→
    61→    if (type === 'posts') {
    62→      const [cate, slug] = rest
    63→      data = await apiClient.post.getPost(cate, slug)
    64→    } else if (type === 'notes') {
    65→      const [nid] = rest
    66→      const response = await apiClient.note.getNoteById(+nid)
    67→      data = response.data
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    const coverImage = data.cover || data.meta?.cover
    71→    let spotlightColor = ''
    72→
    73→    if (coverImage) {
    74→      // Async load dominant color
    75→      const $image = new Image()
    76→      $image.src = coverImage
    77→      $image.crossOrigin = 'Anonymous'
    78→      // Note: In the plugin architecture, we can't update state after initial return
    79→      // The color will be set initially, and dynamic update would require different handling
    80→      try {
    81→        await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
    82→          $image.onload = () => {
    83→            spotlightColor = getDominantColor($image)
    84→            resolve()
    85→          }
    86→          $image.onerror = reject
    87→          // Timeout fallback
    88→          setTimeout(resolve, 3000)
    89→        })
    90→      } catch {
    91→        // Use fallback color
    92→        spotlightColor = uniqolor(data.title, {
    93→          saturation: [30, 35],
    94→          lightness: [60, 70],
    95→        }).color
    96→      }
    97→    } else {
    98→      spotlightColor = uniqolor(data.title, {
    99→        saturation: [30, 35],
   100→        lightness: [60, 70],
   101→      }).color
   102→    }
   103→
   104→    return {
   105→      title: data.title,
   106→      desc:
   107→        data.summary || `${RemoveMarkdown(data.text ?? '').slice(0, 50)}...`,
   108→      image: coverImage || data.images?.[0]?.src,
   109→      color: spotlightColor,
   110→    }
   111→  },
   112→}
   113→
```

1. **Initial Request**: The user selected line 60 (`plugins`) in `LinkCardRenderer.tsx` and asked to:

2. **Exploration Phase**: I explored the linkcard plugin system extensively:

   - `plugins/index.ts` - 12 built-in plugins sorted by priority
   - `types.ts` - `LinkCardPlugin`, `PluginRegistry`, `LinkCardData`, etc.
   - `hooks/useUrlMatcher.ts` - URL matching logic

   - How `RendererWrapper` passes props

3. **Core Change - LinkCardRenderer.tsx**:
   - Changed `plugins = builtinPlugins` to `plugins: extraPlugins`
   - Added `mergedPlugins` useMemo that merges builtins with extra plugins (same-name override, priority sort)
   - Updated `useUrlMatcher` call to use `mergedPlugins`

4. **Demo Creation**:

5. **Error: Missing dependency**: Vite failed to resolve `@haklex/rich-renderer-linkcard/static`. Fixed by adding the dependency to `rich-editor-demo/package.json` and running `pnpm install`.

6. **Error: Dark mode not applied**: User reported LinkCards rendering in light mode while page was dark. I first tried wrapping with `PortalThemeProvider`, but that's just a context provider without DOM output. Then changed to wrapping with a div that has `getVariantClass('article')` className and `data-theme={theme}`.

7. **Error: CSS var --bg-secondary not defined**: User showed screenshot where `--bg-secondary` was undefined. The `<pre>` code block used `var(--bg-secondary, #f5f5f5)`. Fixed by changing to `var(--demo-surface, #f5f5f5)` (using the demo's own CSS variable).

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - **Request 1**: Modify `LinkCardRenderer`'s `plugins` prop to merge with built-in plugins instead of replacing them, then add a demo in the editor demo showing business extension plugins.
   - **Request 2**: Remove `mxSpacePlugin` from the built-in linkcard plugins. It's a business-specific plugin that should be implemented in the business layer (apps/web) and extended via the new merge `plugins` prop.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **LinkCard Plugin System**: `LinkCardPlugin` interface with `name`, `displayName`, `priority`, `typeClass`, `provider`, `matchUrl()`, `isValidId()`, `fetch()` methods
   - **PluginRegistry**: `readonly LinkCardPlugin[]` type
   - **Plugin merge strategy**: Use `Map` keyed by `name` — built-ins first, then extra plugins override same-name entries, finally sort by `priority` descending
   - **Static/Edit split architecture**: Renderer packages export `./static` (read-only) and `./` (edit) entries for tree-shaking
   - **RendererConfig injection**: `RendererWrapper` component delegates to custom renderer from context or falls back to default
   - **Theme system**: CSS variables from `@haklex/rich-style-token` are activated by applying variant class (e.g., `articleVariant`) + `data-theme` attribute on a wrapper DOM element. `PortalThemeProvider` is context-only, not DOM.
   - **Re-export chain**: `rich-renderer-linkcard` → `rich-renderers` → `rich-kit-shiro` (each layer re-exports)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`** — Core component, main change target
     - Changed `plugins` prop from replace to merge semantics
     ```typescript
     // Before:
     plugins = builtinPlugins,
     
     // After:
     plugins: extraPlugins,
     
     // Merge logic:
     const mergedPlugins = useMemo(() => {
       if (!extraPlugins || extraPlugins.length === 0) return builtinPlugins
       const map = new Map(builtinPlugins.map((p) => [p.name, p]))
       for (const plugin of extraPlugins) {
         map.set(plugin.name, plugin)
       }
       return [...map.values()].sort(
         (a, b) => (b.priority ?? 0) - (a.priority ?? 0),
       )
     }, [extraPlugins])
     
     const pluginMap = useMemo(
       () => new Map(mergedPlugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
       [mergedPlugins],
     )
     
     const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
       !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
       mergedPlugins,
     )
     ```
     - Updated JSDoc on `plugins` prop: `额外插件，与内置插件合并（同名覆盖内置，按 priority 排序）`

   - **`packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/plugins/index.ts`** — Built-in plugin registry

     - Kept `createMxSpacePlugin` and `MxSpacePluginConfig` exports

    16→  id?: string

    25→function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
    26→  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)
    27→
    28→  return (
    29→    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
    30→      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (
    31→        <img src={favicon} alt="" onError={() => setFaviconFailed(true)} />

    34→      )}
    35→    </span>
    36→  )
    37→}
    38→
    39→function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
    40→  if (!classNames) return ''
    41→  return classNames
    42→    .split(/\s+/)
    43→    .filter(Boolean)
    44→    .map((cls) =>
    45→      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
    46→        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
    47→        : cls,
    48→    )
    49→    .join(' ')
    50→}
    51→
    52→export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (
    53→  props,
    54→) => {
    55→  const {
    56→    url,
    57→    title,
    58→    description,
    59→    favicon,
    60→    image,
    61→    source: explicitSource,
    62→    id: explicitId,
    63→    className,
    64→    plugins: extraPlugins,
    65→    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
    66→  } = props
    67→
    68→  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
    69→  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue
    70→
    71→  const mergedPlugins = useMemo(() => {
    72→    if (!extraPlugins || extraPlugins.length === 0) return builtinPlugins
    73→    const map = new Map(builtinPlugins.map((p) => [p.name, p]))
    74→    for (const plugin of extraPlugins) {
    75→      map.set(plugin.name, plugin)
    76→    }
    77→    return [...map.values()].sort(
    78→      (a, b) => (b.priority ?? 0) - (a.priority ?? 0),
    79→    )
    80→  }, [extraPlugins])
    81→
    82→  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    83→    () => new Map(mergedPlugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    84→    [mergedPlugins],
    85→  )
    86→
    87→  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    88→    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    89→    mergedPlugins,
    90→  )
    91→  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
    92→  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id
    93→  const matchedFullUrl = urlMatch?.match.fullUrl
    94→
    95→  const useDynamicFetch = !!source && !!id
    96→  const selectedPlugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
    97→  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    98→    source,
    99→    plugin: selectedPlugin,
   100→    id: id || '',
   101→    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
   102→    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
   103→    context: fetchContext,
   104→  })
   105→
   106→  const typeClass = selectedPlugin?.typeClass
   107→  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
   108→  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
   109→    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
   110→    : ''
   111→
   112→  const finalTitle = cardInfo?.title || title || url
   113→  const finalDesc = cardInfo?.desc || description
   114→  const finalImage = cardInfo?.image || image
   115→  const finalColor = cardInfo?.color
   116→  const classNames = cardInfo?.classNames || {}
   117→  const mappedCardRootClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.cardRoot)
   118→  const mappedImageClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.image)
   119→
   120→  const [shortDesc, setShortDesc] = useState(false)
   121→  const descRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)
   122→
   123→  useEffect(() => {
   124→    const el = descRef.current
   125→    if (!el || !finalDesc) {
   126→      setShortDesc(false)
   127→      return
   128→    }
   129→    const style = getComputedStyle(el)
   130→    const lineHeight = Number.parseFloat(style.lineHeight) || 1.5 * 14
   131→    const maxTwoLines = lineHeight * 2
   132→    setShortDesc(el.scrollHeight <= maxTwoLines + 1)
   133→  }, [finalDesc, finalTitle])
   134→
   135→  if (useDynamicFetch && !isValid) {
   136→    return null
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  if (useDynamicFetch && loading) {
   140→    return (
   141→      <a
   142→        data-hide-print
   143→        ref={ref}
   144→        href={fullUrl}
   145→        target="_blank"
   146→        rel="noopener noreferrer"
   147→      >
   148→        <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
   149→      </a>
   150→    )
   151→  }
   152→
   153→  const hasImage = !!finalImage
   154→  const showImagePlaceholder = useDynamicFetch && isError && !hasImage
   155→
   156→  return (
   157→    <a
   158→      data-hide-print
   159→      ref={useDynamicFetch ? ref : undefined}
   160→      className={[
   161→        styles.card,
   162→        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
   163→        typeStyleClass,
   164→        typeSemanticClass,
   165→        shortDesc && styles.cardShortDesc,
   166→        shortDesc && styles.semanticClassNames.cardShortDesc,
   167→        useDynamicFetch && (loading || isError) && styles.cardSkeleton,
   168→        useDynamicFetch &&
   169→          (loading || isError) &&
   170→          styles.semanticClassNames.cardSkeleton,
   171→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.cardError,
   172→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.semanticClassNames.cardError,
   173→        'not-prose',
   174→        className,
   175→        mappedCardRootClass,
   176→      ]
   177→        .filter(Boolean)
   178→        .join(' ')}
   179→      data-source={source || undefined}
   180→      href={useDynamicFetch ? fullUrl : url}
   181→      target="_blank"
   182→      rel="noopener noreferrer"
   183→      style={{
   184→        borderColor: finalColor ? `${finalColor}30` : undefined,
   185→      }}
   186→    >
   187→      {finalColor && (
   188→        <div
   189→          className={`${styles.bg} ${styles.semanticClassNames.bg}`}
   190→          style={{
   191→            backgroundColor: finalColor,
   192→            opacity: 0.04,
   193→          }}
   194→        />
   195→      )}
   196→      {hasImage || showImagePlaceholder ? (
   197→        <span
   198→          className={[
   199→            styles.image,
   200→            styles.semanticClassNames.image,
   201→            mappedImageClass,
   202→          ]
   203→            .filter(Boolean)
   204→            .join(' ')}
   205→          data-image={finalImage || ''}
   206→          style={{
   207→            backgroundImage: finalImage ? `url(${finalImage})` : undefined,
   208→          }}
   209→        />
   210→      ) : (
   211→        <FallbackIcon favicon={favicon} />
   212→      )}
   213→      <span
   214→        className={`${styles.content} ${styles.semanticClassNames.content}`}
   215→      >
   216→        <span className={`${styles.title} ${styles.semanticClassNames.title}`}>
   217→          <span
   218→            className={`${styles.titleText} ${styles.semanticClassNames.titleText}`}
   219→          >
   220→            {finalTitle}
   221→          </span>
   222→        </span>
   223→        {finalDesc && (

   227→          >
   228→            {finalDesc}
   229→          </span>
   230→        )}
   231→      </span>
   232→    </a>

   234→}

     1→import type {

     7→import { fetchJsonWithContext, generateColor, stripMarkdown } from '../../utils'
     8→
     9→export interface MxSpacePluginConfig {
    10→  webUrl: string
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function createMxSpacePlugin(
    14→  config: MxSpacePluginConfig,
    15→): LinkCardPlugin {
    16→  const webHost = new URL(config.webUrl).hostname
    17→
    18→  return {
    19→    name: 'self',
    20→    displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    21→    priority: 10,
    22→    provider: 'mx-space',
    23→
    24→    matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    25→      if (webHost !== url.hostname) return null
    26→      if (
    27→        !url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/') &&
    28→        !url.pathname.startsWith('/notes/')
    29→      ) {
    30→        return null
    31→      }
    32→      return { id: url.pathname.slice(1), fullUrl: url.toString() }
    33→    },
    34→
    35→    isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    36→      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    37→      if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') return false
    38→      if (type === 'posts') return rest.length === 2
    39→      return rest.length === 1
    40→    },
    41→
    42→    async fetch(
    43→      id: string,
    44→      _meta?: Record<string, unknown>,
    45→      context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    46→    ): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    47→      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    48→      let data: {
    49→        title: string
    50→        text: string
    51→        images?: { src: string }[]
    52→        meta?: Record<string, any>
    53→        cover?: string
    54→        summary?: string | null
    55→      } = { title: '', text: '' }
    56→
    57→      if (type === 'posts') {
    58→        const [cate, slug] = rest
    59→        data = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    60→          `posts/${cate}/${slug}`,
    61→          context,
    62→          'mx-space',
    63→        )
    64→      } else if (type === 'notes') {
    65→        const [nid] = rest
    66→        const response = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    67→          `notes/${nid}`,
    68→          context,
    69→          'mx-space',
    70→        )
    71→        data = response.data || response
    72→      }
    73→
    74→      const coverImage = data.cover || data.meta?.cover
    75→      const spotlightColor = generateColor(data.title)
    76→
    77→      return {
    78→        title: data.title,
    79→        desc: data.summary || `${stripMarkdown(data.text).slice(0, 50)}...`,
    80→        image: coverImage || data.images?.[0]?.src,
    81→        color: spotlightColor,
    82→      }
    83→    },
    84→  }
    85→}
    86→
    87→export const mxSpacePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    88→  name: 'self',
    89→  displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    90→  priority: 10,
    91→  provider: 'mx-space',
    92→
    93→  matchUrl(_url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    94→    return null
    95→  },
    96→
    97→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    98→    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    99→    if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') return false
   100→    if (type === 'posts') return rest.length === 2
   101→    return rest.length === 1
   102→  },
   103→
   104→  async fetch(

Perfect. Now I have all the key files. Let me create a summary document for you:

## Summary: LinkCard Component Usage in apps/web

Based on my analysis of the codebase, here's the complete picture of how LinkCard is used:

---

## **1. LinkCard.tsx** - Main Component
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/LinkCard.tsx`

The main component with two-tier rendering:
- **LinkCard** - Wraps LinkCardImpl with lazy loading via LazyLoad component
- **LinkCardImpl** - Actual implementation that:
  - Calls `useCardFetcher` to load card data via plugins
  - Uses `pluginMap.get(source)` to find plugin by source name
  - Renders motion spotlight effect on hover
  - Uses Next.js `Link` for internal ('self') links, `<a>` tag for external
  - Shows skeleton while loading, error state handling

Key props: `id` (required), `source` (defaults to 'self'), `className`, `fallbackUrl`

---

## **2. plugins/index.ts** - Plugin Registry
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/plugins/index.ts`

Central plugin system:
- Sorted by priority (GitHub highest, self/mxSpace lowest)
- Exports `plugins` array and `pluginMap` (Map for O(1) lookups)
- Available plugins:
  - **GitHub**: repo, commit, PR, issue, discussion
  - **Academic**: arxiv
  - **Media**: TMDB, Bangumi, QQ Music, Netease Music
  - **Code**: LeetCode
  - **Self**: mxSpace (internal links)

---

## **3. plugins/self/mx-space.tsx** - Self/Internal Link Plugin
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/plugins/self/mx-space.tsx`

Handles internal blog links (posts and notes):

---

## **4. types.ts** - Type Definitions
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/types.ts`

Core interfaces:
- **LinkCardData**: title, desc, image, color, classNames
- **UrlMatchResult**: id, fullUrl, meta
- **LinkCardPlugin**: name, displayName, priority, typeClass, featureGate, matchUrl(), isValidId(), fetch()
- **PluginRegistry**: readonly LinkCardPlugin[]

---

## **5. useCardFetcher.ts** - Data Fetching Hook
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/hooks/useCardFetcher.ts`

Fetches card data:
- Gets plugin from `pluginMap` by source
- Validates ID format via `plugin.isValidId()`
- Checks feature gates (only TMDB currently gated)
- Lazy-loads on intersection (when component comes into view)
- Returns: loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref

---

## **6. usePluginMatcher.ts** - URL Matching Hook
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/hooks/usePluginMatcher.ts`

Matches URLs to plugins:
- Iterates through `plugins` array by priority
- Respects feature gates
- Returns PluginMatchResult (plugin + match) or null
- Used by `LinkRenderer` to determine which plugin handles a URL

---

## **7. LinkRenderer.tsx** - Integration Point
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/renderers/LinkRenderer.tsx`

**BlockLinkRenderer** component handles:
- Uses `usePluginMatcher().matchUrl(url)` to find matching plugin
- If plugin matches: renders `<LinkCard source={plugin.name} id={match.id} />`
- If no plugin match: falls back to special handling:
  - GitHub URLs → `GithubUrlRenderL` (gist embeds, file previews, etc.)
  - Twitter → `<Tweet>` component
  - YouTube → iframe embed
  - CodeSandbox → iframe embed
  - Thinking → `ThinkingLinkRenderer`
  - Bilibili → iframe embed
- Default fallback: `<MarkdownLink>` (plain link)

**GithubUrlRenderL** sub-component:
- Uses plugin matcher for GitHub-specific cards (repos, PRs, issues, discussions)
- Special handling for commits (shows link text above card)
- Falls back to gist/file embed or markdown link

---

## **8. Other Components**

**LinkCardSkeleton.tsx**:
- Shows loading state while `useCardFetcher` is fetching
- Gets typeClass from plugin for consistent styling

**ShadowLinkCard.tsx**:
- Wraps LinkCard in Shadow DOM for style isolation
- Used when rendering inside content where prose styles might interfere

**enums.tsx** - LinkCardSource enum:
```typescript
enum LinkCardSource {
  GHRepo, Self, MxSpace, GHCommit, GHPr, TMDB, 
  Bangumi, LEETCODE, Arxiv, QQMusicSong, NeteaseMusicSong
}
```

---

## **Flow Diagram**

```
LinkRenderer (markdown layer)
  → usePluginMatcher().matchUrl(url)
    → plugins array (by priority)
      → Check feature gate
      → plugin.matchUrl(url) → UrlMatchResult or null
  → If match: <LinkCard source={plugin.name} id={match.id} />
  → LinkCardImpl
    → useCardFetcher({ source, id })
      → pluginMap.get(source)
      → plugin.isValidId(id)
      → Lazy load on intersection
      → plugin.fetch(id) → LinkCardData
      → setState(cardInfo)
    → Render card with color, image, title, desc
  → If no match: Handle special embeds (gist, tweet, etc.) or fallback to <MarkdownLink>
```

---

## **Key Observations**

1. **Plugin-based architecture**: Each link type is a plugin defining URL matching and data fetching
2. **Priority-ordered matching**: Plugins checked in priority order; GitHub first, self/mxSpace last
3. **Lazy loading**: Cards only fetch data when scrolled into view (intersection observer)
4. **Feature gates**: Only TMDB currently gated (via `useFeatureEnabled('tmdb')`)
5. **No RendererConfig**: There's no centralized RendererConfig in apps/web; configuration is per-component and inline
6. **Shadow DOM isolation**: `ShadowLinkCard` for when rendering in styled content to prevent style leakage
7. **Fallback chain**: Plugin → special embed (tweet, iframe) → markdown link

    29→
    30→export const LinkCard: FC<Omit<LinkCardProps, 'placeholder'>> = (props) => {
    31→  const isClient = useIsClientTransition()
    32→  const { source = 'self' } = props
    33→
    34→  const placeholder = <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
    35→
    36→  if (!isClient) return placeholder
    37→

    44→
    45→const LinkCardImpl: FC<LinkCardProps> = (props) => {
    46→  const { id, source = 'self', className, fallbackUrl, placeholder } = props
    47→
    48→  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    49→    source,

    51→    fallbackUrl,

    53→
    54→  const plugin = pluginMap.get(source)

    56→
    57→  const peek = usePeek()
    58→  const isCommandPressed = useIsCommandOrControlPressed()
    59→
    60→  const handleCanPeek = useCallback(
    61→    async (e: SyntheticEvent<any>) => {
    62→      if (isCommandPressed) return
    63→      const success = peek(fullUrl)
    64→      if (success) preventDefault(e)

    66→    [fullUrl, isCommandPressed, peek],

    68→

    75→      const bounds = currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect()
    76→      mouseX.set(clientX - bounds.left)
    77→      mouseY.set(clientY - bounds.top)
    78→      radius.set(Math.hypot(bounds.width, bounds.height) * 1.3)

    48→  mxSpacePlugin,
    49→].sort((a, b) => (b.priority ?? 0) - (a.priority ?? 0))

    51→/**
    52→ * Get plugin by name (for explicit source usage)

```text
     1→import RemoveMarkdown from 'remove-markdown'
     2→import uniqolor from 'uniqolor'
     3→
     4→import { getWebUrl } from '~/atoms'
     5→import { getDominantColor } from '~/lib/image'
     6→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     7→
     8→import type { LinkCardData, LinkCardPlugin, UrlMatchResult } from '../../types'
     9→
    10→export const mxSpacePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    11→  name: 'self',
    12→  displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    13→  priority: 10, // Low priority - catch internal links last
    14→
    15→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    16→    // Check if it's a self URL
    17→    const webUrl = getWebUrl()
    18→    const webHost = webUrl ? new URL(webUrl).hostname : ''
    19→
    20→    const isSelfHost = webHost === url.hostname
    21→
    22→    if (!isSelfHost) return null
    23→
    24→    // Check for posts or notes paths
    25→    if (
    26→      !url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/') &&
    27→      !url.pathname.startsWith('/notes/')
    28→    ) {
    29→      return null
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    return {
    33→      id: url.pathname.slice(1), // Remove leading slash
    34→      fullUrl: url.toString(),
    35→    }
    36→  },
    37→
    38→  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    39→    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    40→    if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') {
    41→      return false
    42→    }
    43→    if (type === 'posts') {
    44→      return rest.length === 2
    45→    }
    46→    return rest.length === 1
    47→  },
    48→
    49→  async fetch(id: string): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    50→    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    51→
    52→    let data: {
    53→      title: string
    54→      text?: string
    55→      images?: { src: string }[]
    56→      meta?: Record<string, any> | null
    57→      cover?: string
    58→      summary?: string | null
    59→    } = { title: '', text: '' }
    60→
    61→    if (type === 'posts') {
    62→      const [cate, slug] = rest
    63→      data = await apiClient.post.getPost(cate, slug)
    64→    } else if (type === 'notes') {
    65→      const [nid] = rest
    66→      const response = await apiClient.note.getNoteById(+nid)
    67→      data = response.data
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    const coverImage = data.cover || data.meta?.cover
    71→    let spotlightColor = ''
    72→
    73→    if (coverImage) {
    74→      // Async load dominant color
    75→      const $image = new Image()
    76→      $image.src = coverImage
    77→      $image.crossOrigin = 'Anonymous'
    78→      // Note: In the plugin architecture, we can't update state after initial return
    79→      // The color will be set initially, and dynamic update would require different handling
    80→      try {
    81→        await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
    82→          $image.onload = () => {
    83→            spotlightColor = getDominantColor($image)
    84→            resolve()
    85→          }
    86→          $image.onerror = reject
    87→          // Timeout fallback
    88→          setTimeout(resolve, 3000)
    89→        })
    90→      } catch {
    91→        // Use fallback color
    92→        spotlightColor = uniqolor(data.title, {
    93→          saturation: [30, 35],
    94→          lightness: [60, 70],
    95→        }).color
    96→      }
    97→    } else {
    98→      spotlightColor = uniqolor(data.title, {
    99→        saturation: [30, 35],
   100→        lightness: [60, 70],
   101→      }).color
   102→    }
   103→
   104→    return {
   105→      title: data.title,
   106→      desc:
   107→        data.summary || `${RemoveMarkdown(data.text ?? '').slice(0, 50)}...`,
   108→      image: coverImage || data.images?.[0]?.src,
   109→      color: spotlightColor,
   110→    }
   111→  },
   112→}
   113→
```

    19→  }
    20→}
    21→
    22→/**
    23→ * URL 匹配结果
    24→ */
    25→export interface UrlMatchResult {
    26→  /** 解析后的 ID */
    27→  id: string
    28→  /** 完整 URL（用于链接跳转） */
    29→  fullUrl?: string
    30→  /** 额外元数据 */
    31→  meta?: Record<string, unknown>
    32→}
    33→
    34→/**
    35→ * Feature Gate 配置
    36→ */
    37→export interface PluginFeatureGate {
    38→  /** Feature flag key */
    39→  featureKey: string
    40→  /** 是否必须启用（默认 true） */
    41→  mustBeEnabled?: boolean
    42→}
    43→
    44→/** 卡片类型样式 */
    45→export type LinkCardTypeClass =
    46→  | 'media'
    47→  | 'github'
    48→  | 'academic'
    49→  | 'wide'
    50→  | 'full'
    51→
    52→/**
    53→ * 插件接口 - 每个插件自包含
    54→ */
    55→export interface LinkCardPlugin<TMeta = Record<string, unknown>> {
    56→  /** 唯一标识符，匹配 LinkCardSource 枚举值 */
    57→  readonly name: string
    58→
    59→  /** 可读名称（调试/文档用） */
    60→  readonly displayName: string
    61→
    62→  /** URL 匹配优先级（越高越先匹配） */
    63→  readonly priority?: number
    64→
    65→  /** 卡片样式类型 */
    66→  readonly typeClass?: LinkCardTypeClass
    67→
    68→  /** Feature gate 配置 */
    69→  readonly featureGate?: PluginFeatureGate
    70→
    71→  /**
    72→   * 匹配 URL
    73→   * @returns 匹配结果或 null
    74→   */
    75→  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null
    76→
    77→  /**
    78→   * 验证 ID 格式（支持显式 source 用法）
    79→   */
    80→  isValidId(id: string): boolean
    81→
    82→  /**
    83→   * 获取卡片数据
    84→   * @param id - 解析后的标识符
    85→   * @param meta - URL 匹配时的元数据
    86→   */
    87→  fetch(id: string, meta?: TMeta): Promise<LinkCardData>
    88→}
    89→
    90→/**
    91→ * 插件注册表类型
    92→ */
    93→export type PluginRegistry = readonly LinkCardPlugin[]
    94→
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/hooks/useCardFetcher.ts`

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
     3→
     4→import { useFeatureEnabled } from '~/providers/root/app-feature-provider'
     5→
     6→import { pluginMap } from '../plugins'
     7→import type { LinkCardData } from '../types'
     8→
     9→export interface UseCardFetcherOptions {
    10→  source: string
    11→  id: string
    12→  fallbackUrl?: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export interface UseCardFetcherResult {
    16→  loading: boolean
    17→  isError: boolean
    18→  cardInfo: LinkCardData | undefined
    19→  fullUrl: string
    20→  isValid: boolean
    21→  ref: (node?: Element | null) => void
    22→}
    23→
    24→/**
    25→ * Hook to fetch card data using plugin system
    26→ */
    27→export function useCardFetcher(
    28→  options: UseCardFetcherOptions,
    29→): UseCardFetcherResult {
    30→  const { source, id, fallbackUrl } = options
    31→
    32→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    33→  const [isError, setIsError] = useState(false)
    34→  const [fullUrl] = useState(fallbackUrl || 'javascript:;')
    35→  const [cardInfo, setCardInfo] = useState<LinkCardData>()
    36→
    37→  // Get plugin
    38→  const plugin = pluginMap.get(source)
    39→
    40→  // Check feature gates - currently only 'tmdb' is gated
    41→  const tmdbEnabled = useFeatureEnabled('tmdb')
    42→
    43→  const isEnabled = useMemo(() => {
    44→    if (!plugin) return false
    45→    if (!plugin.featureGate) return true
    46→
    47→    const { featureKey, mustBeEnabled = true } = plugin.featureGate
    48→
    49→    // Map feature keys to their enabled state
    50→    const featureStates: Record<string, boolean> = {
    51→      tmdb: tmdbEnabled,
    52→    }
    53→
    54→    const isFeatureEnabled = featureStates[featureKey] ?? true
    55→    return mustBeEnabled ? isFeatureEnabled : !isFeatureEnabled
    56→  }, [plugin, tmdbEnabled])
    57→
    58→  const isValid = useMemo(() => {
    59→    if (!plugin || !isEnabled) return false
    60→    return plugin.isValidId(id)
    61→  }, [plugin, isEnabled, id])
    62→
    63→  const fetchInfo = useCallback(async () => {
    64→    if (!plugin || !isValid) return
    65→
    66→    setLoading(true)
    67→    setIsError(false)
    68→
    69→    try {
    70→      const data = await plugin.fetch(id)
    71→      setCardInfo(data)
    72→    } catch (err) {
    73→      console.error(`[LinkCard] Error fetching ${source} data:`, err)
    74→      setIsError(true)
    75→    } finally {
    76→      setLoading(false)
    77→    }
    78→  }, [plugin, isValid, id, source])
    79→
    80→  const { ref } = useInView({
    81→    triggerOnce: true,
    82→    onChange(inView) {
    83→      if (!inView) return
    84→      fetchInfo()
    85→    },
    86→  })
    87→
    88→  return {
    89→    loading,
    90→    isError,
    91→    cardInfo,
    92→    fullUrl,
    93→    isValid,
    94→    ref,
    95→  }
    96→}
    97→
```
</details></tool-use>

    11→import {

    34→
    35→/**
    36→ * 单行链接的渲染
    37→ */
    38→export const BlockLinkRenderer = ({
    39→  href,
    40→  children,
    41→  fallback,
    42→  accessory,
    43→}: PropsWithChildren<{
    44→  href: string
    45→  fallback?: ReactNode
    46→  accessory?: ReactNode
    47→}>) => {
    48→  const url = useMemo(() => {
    49→    try {
    50→      return new URL(href)
    51→    } catch {
    52→      return null
    53→    }
    54→  }, [href])
    55→
    56→  const fallbackElement = useMemo(
    57→    () =>
    58→      fallback ?? (
    59→        <p>
    60→          <MarkdownLink href={href}>
    61→            {children ?? <span>{href}</span>}
    62→          </MarkdownLink>

    64→      ),
    65→    [children, fallback, href],

    68→  const { matchUrl } = usePluginMatcher()

    72→

    80→          id={pluginMatch.match.id}
    81→        />
    82→      )
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    // Handle non-ShadowLinkCard embeds (iframes, tweets, etc.)
    86→    switch (true) {
    87→      case isGithubUrl(url): {
    88→        return (
    89→          <GithubUrlRenderL
    90→            url={url}
    91→            href={href}
    92→            fallbackElement={fallbackElement}
    93→          />
    94→        )
    95→      }
    96→
    97→      case isTweetUrl(url): {
    98→        const id = getTweetId(url)
    99→        return (
   100→          <Suspense>
   101→            <Tweet id={id} />
   102→          </Suspense>
   103→        )
   104→      }
   105→
   106→      case isYoutubeUrl(url): {
   107→        const id = url.searchParams.get('v')!

   109→          <FixedRatioContainer>

   128→              )}?fontsize=14&hidenavigation=1&theme=dark${url.search}`}

   136→        return <ThinkingLinkRenderer id={id} />
   137→      }
   138→
   139→      case isBilibiliVideoUrl(url): {
   140→        const { id } = parseBilibiliVideoUrl(url)
   141→        return (
   142→          <div className="w-screen max-w-full">
   143→            <FixedRatioContainer>
   144→              <ClientOnly
   145→                fallback={
   146→                  <BlockLoading className="absolute inset-0 size-full rounded-md">
   147→                    哔哩哔哩视频加载中...
   148→                  </BlockLoading>
   149→                }
   150→              >
   151→                <iframe
   152→                  src={`//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=${id}&autoplay=0`}
   153→                  scrolling="no"
   154→                  frameBorder="no"
   155→                  className="absolute inset-0 size-full rounded-md border-0"
   156→                  allowFullScreen
   157→                />
   158→              </ClientOnly>
   159→            </FixedRatioContainer>
   160→          </div>
   161→        )
   162→      }
   163→    }
   164→
   165→    return null
   166→  }, [fallbackElement, href, matchUrl, url])
   167→
   168→  if (!url) {

   196→  )
   197→}
   198→

   204→  children: React.ReactNode
   205→}) => (

   208→      <div
   209→        className="relative h-0 w-full"
   210→        style={{

   212→        }}
   213→      >
   214→        {children}
   215→      </div>
   216→    </div>
   217→  </div>
   218→)
   219→
   220→const GithubUrlRenderL: FC<{
   221→  url: URL
   222→  href?: string
   223→  fallbackElement: ReactNode
   224→}> = (props) => {
   225→  const { url, href = url.href, fallbackElement } = props
   226→  const { matchUrl } = usePluginMatcher()
   227→
   228→  // Try plugin matching first for GitHub-specific cards
   229→  const pluginMatch = matchUrl(url)
   230→  if (pluginMatch) {
   231→    // Handle commit links specially - show link text above card
   232→    if (pluginMatch.plugin.name === 'gh-commit') {
   233→      return (
   234→        <>
   235→          <p>
   236→            <MarkdownLink href={href}>{href}</MarkdownLink>
   237→          </p>
   238→          <LinkCard
   239→            fallbackUrl={pluginMatch.match.fullUrl || url.toString()}
   240→            id={pluginMatch.match.id}
   241→            source={pluginMatch.plugin.name}
   242→          />
   243→        </>
   244→      )
   245→    }
   246→
   247→    return (
   248→      <LinkCard
   249→        fallbackUrl={pluginMatch.match.fullUrl || url.toString()}
   250→        id={pluginMatch.match.id}
   251→        source={pluginMatch.plugin.name}
   252→      />
   253→    )
   254→  }
   255→
   256→  // Handle non-card GitHub embeds
   257→  switch (true) {
   258→    case isGistUrl(url): {
   259→      const { owner, id } = parseGithubGistUrl(url)
   260→      return (
   261→        <>
   262→          <iframe
   263→            src={`https://gist.github.com/${owner}/${id}.pibb`}
   264→            className="h-[300px] w-full overflow-auto border-0"
   265→          />
   266→          <a
   267→            className="center mt-2 flex space-x-2"
   268→            href={href}
   269→            target="_blank"
   270→            rel="noreferrer"
   271→          >
   272→            <GitHubBrandIcon />
   273→            <span>{href}</span>
   274→          </a>
   275→        </>
   276→      )
   277→    }
   278→
   279→    case isGithubFilePreviewUrl(url): {
   280→      const { owner, repo, afterTypeString } = parseGithubTypedUrl(url)
   281→      const splitString = afterTypeString.split('/')
   282→      const ref = splitString[0]
   283→      const path = ref ? splitString.slice(1).join('/') : afterTypeString
   284→      const matchResult = url.hash.match(/L\d+/g)
   285→      let startLineNumber = 0
   286→      let endLineNumber
   287→      if (!matchResult) {
   288→        startLineNumber = 0
   289→        endLineNumber = undefined
   290→      } else if (matchResult.length === 1) {
   291→        startLineNumber = Number.parseInt(matchResult[0].slice(1)) - 1
   292→        endLineNumber = startLineNumber + 1
   293→      } else {
   294→        startLineNumber = Number.parseInt(matchResult[0].slice(1)) - 1
   295→        endLineNumber = Number.parseInt(matchResult[1].slice(1))
   296→      }
   297→      return (
   298→        <div className="flex w-full flex-col items-center">
   299→          <EmbedGithubFile
   300→            owner={owner}
   301→            repo={repo}
   302→            path={path}
   303→            startLineNumber={startLineNumber}
   304→            endLineNumber={endLineNumber}
   305→            refType={ref}
   306→          />
   307→          <div className="mt-4">
   308→            <MarkdownLink href={href}>{href}</MarkdownLink>
   309→          </div>
   310→        </div>
   311→      )
   312→    }
   313→  }
   314→
   315→  return fallbackElement
   316→}
   317→

```text
     1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useFeatureEnabled } from '~/providers/root/app-feature-provider'
     4→
     5→import { plugins } from '../plugins'
     6→import type { LinkCardPlugin, UrlMatchResult } from '../types'
     7→
     8→export interface PluginMatchResult {
     9→  plugin: LinkCardPlugin
    10→  match: UrlMatchResult
    11→}
    12→
    13→/**
    14→ * Hook to find matching plugin for a URL
    15→ * Respects feature gates and priority ordering
    16→ */
    17→export function usePluginMatcher() {
    18→  // Get all feature states upfront
    19→  const tmdbEnabled = useFeatureEnabled('tmdb')
    20→
    21→  const featureStates = useMemo(
    22→    () => ({
    23→      tmdb: tmdbEnabled,
    24→    }),
    25→    [tmdbEnabled],
    26→  )
    27→
    28→  const matchUrl = useMemo(() => {
    29→    return (url: URL): PluginMatchResult | null => {
    30→      for (const plugin of plugins) {
    31→        // Check feature gate
    32→        if (plugin.featureGate) {
    33→          const { featureKey, mustBeEnabled = true } = plugin.featureGate
    34→          const isEnabled =
    35→            featureStates[featureKey as keyof typeof featureStates]
    36→          if (mustBeEnabled && !isEnabled) continue
    37→          if (!mustBeEnabled && isEnabled) continue
    38→        }
    39→
    40→        // Try to match URL
    41→        const match = plugin.matchUrl(url)
    42→        if (match) {
    43→          return { plugin, match }
    44→        }
    45→      }
    46→      return null
    47→    }
    48→  }, [featureStates])
    49→
    50→  return { matchUrl, featureStates }
    51→}
    52→
```
</details></tool-use>

    14→  /**
    15→   * Additional class name for the shadow DOM container
    16→   */
    17→  containerClassName?: string
    18→}
    19→
    20→/**
    21→ * LinkCard wrapped in Shadow DOM for style isolation.
    22→ * Use this component when rendering LinkCard inside article content
    23→ * where parent styles (e.g., .prose) might pollute the card styles.
    24→ */
    25→export const ShadowLinkCard: FC<ShadowLinkCardProps> = (props) => {
    26→  const { containerClassName, ...linkCardProps } = props
    27→
    28→  return (
    29→    <ShadowDOM
    30→      injectHostStyles
    31→      className={containerClassName}
    32→      style={{ display: 'contents' }}
    33→    >
    34→      <LinkCard {...linkCardProps} />
    35→    </ShadowDOM>
    36→  )
    37→}
